text: If Lot of Fortune and its Part in Gemini in a cadent house., then The first things were moderate.
If Sun trine Saturn AND Saturn in a cadent house., then The first things were moderate.

If Mercury (co-ruler) angular AND Lot of Fortune in Taurus AND its Part in Libra AND its ruler (Venus) midheaven to the Lot of Fortune AND angular to other things., then Rise from humble and moderate fortune to a commanding and authoritative fortune.
If Sun trine Venus AND Moon. AND Venus in a cadent house., then The first things were laborious and humble.
If Moon found angular., then Later became involved in military and commanding positions.
If Lot of Fortune in Taurus AND its Part in Cancer AND its ruler (Moon) midheaven to the Lot of Fortune., then Reached greatest fortune and commanding position.
If Mars found in the Perirochetic place., then Associated with theft, embezzlement, and violence, which were plundered after death.

If Night birth AND Moon trine Mars AND Mars cadent AND Mars cadent to the Lot of Fortune AND to its ruler., then The first things were humble and needy, suffered from slander and contempt, and was surrounded by many dangers.
If The co-rulers/co-significators ending in tetragonic places., then Became a royal official through friendships and restorations.
If The Part of Fortune found in Leo AND its ruler (Sun) midheaven to the Lot of Fortune., then Became a leader and held authoritative power.
If Lot of Fortune in Pisces AND Lot of Spirit in Pisces AND Jupiter, lord of the 3rd house, in Midheaven, then The native becomes a leader of friends, builds temples, and achieves eternal memory.

If Lot of Fortune in Pisces AND Jupiter in Pisces (ruling Lot of Fortune) AND Venus is the Ascendant AND Venus is the lord of the Lot of Fortune AND Venus is the lord of the Lot of Spirit, then The native inherits great wealth, even if born in infancy.
If Lords of the trigon are angular, then In the beginning, the nativity was well-off and prosperous.
If Lords of the trigon are opposing AND Mars, lord of the Lot of Fortune, is cadent AND Mars is aspected by Saturn, then Later became fallen and needy due to debt and seizure.
If Lords of the trigon are angular, then In the early years, the native had great visions, deeds, and political achievements.
If Mars opposes the Lot of Fortune AND Mercury opposes the Lot of Fortune AND Lords of the Lot of Fortune are cadent, then Later, the native was deposed by force and became a wanderer.

If Lords of the Sun's trigon are in domicile AND Lords of the Lot of Fortune are in domicile AND Lords of the Lot of Spirit are in domicile AND all are aspected by Jupiter, then Born a slave, the native entered a noble family, rose to political office, and became famous.
If Mars is cadent AND Saturn is cadent AND Eros is cadent, then The native's life was shortened and they became indebted.

If Sun in Aquarius AND Moon in Scorpio AND Jupiter in Scorpio AND Saturn in Cancer AND Mars in Capricorn AND Venus in Capricorn AND Mercury in Capricorn AND Ascendant in Pisces, then The native became a famous priest of the gods.
If The lords of the sect, Saturn and Mercury, are benefic (good daemons) but are found in opposition., then The native falls into many troubles, slanders, and princely/royal apologies.
If The Sun and Moon are in money-making houses, guarded by oriental planets, with no malefics opposing., then Nativities are fortunate, glorious, princely, and royal.
If The lords of the Sun and Moon are rising (on the Ascendant) or angular (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th houses)., then Nativities are fortunate, glorious, princely, and royal.
If The degree of the New Moon (synodic) or Full Moon is rising (on the Ascendant) or culminating (on the Midheaven)., then Natives will be fortunate.
If The lords of the degree of the New Moon (synodic) or Full Moon are rising (on the Ascendant) or culminating (on the Midheaven)., then Natives will be fortunate.

If The Sun is found under the earth (in the lower hemisphere, Houses 1-6)., then The native becomes famous and rich, but arranges their life badly, or is surrounded by envies, accusations, and slanders.

If The Moon is found under the earth (in the lower hemisphere, Houses 1-6)., then The native becomes famous and rich, but arranges their life badly, or is surrounded by envies, accusations, and slanders.

If Most of the planets are found under the earth (in the lower hemisphere, Houses 1-6)., then The native becomes famous and rich, but arranges their life badly, or is surrounded by envies, accusations, and slanders.

If The rulers of the Lot of Fortune, Lot of Basis, and Lot of Daimon exchange places (e.g., ruler of Fortune's Lot in Basis's place, Basis's Lot ruler in Daimon's place, Daimon's Lot ruler in Fortune's place)., then The native is fortunate and a royal official.
If The ruler of the Lot of Basis is in the place of the Lot of Daimon, and the ruler of the Lot of Daimon is also present., then The native is fortunate and great-famed.
If The rulers of the Lot of Daimon, Lot of Fortune, and Lot of Basis are in their own places., then The native is fortunate.
If The Lot of Daimon is found with the Sun, and its ruler is oriental., then The native will be fortunate.
If Venus rules the Lot of Fortune OR the Lot of Daimon OR the Lot of Basis, and is found oriental, and is in her own place., then The native is fortunate.
If The ruler is in the Lot of Basis, and the Moon is co-present with it., then The native will be fortunate and famous.
If The ruler is in the Lot of Daimon, and the Sun is co-present with it., then The native is fortunate, famous, and tyrannical (a powerful ruler).
If Mars is found in the Lot of Daimon, and in the places of the Moon, and the Moon is co-present., then A princely, ruling, glorious birth.

If Mercury is found in the Lot of Daimon, is oriental, is testified to by benefics, and is in the places of the Moon., then The native will be fortunate through writings and education, much loved, very knowledgeable, honored and revered, deemed worthy of glory, and blessed by many.

If Jupiter rules the Lot of Daimon, and is overcome by Saturn., then The native will not be unfortunate, but active and glorious. However, being involved in oppositions, he will be deposed or exiled and will lose everything.
If The ruler is co-present with the Lot of Daimon, is oriental, and with the Moon., then The native is fortunate, rich, and generous.
If The Sun is in the Lot of Daimon, is of its own sect, and its ruler is in its own place., then The native is glorious, honored, and much loved.
If The Sun is in the Lot of Daimon and is of the opposite sect., then The native will be fortunate after the times of the adversary.

If If the lord of the Lot of Fortune, or the Lot of Acquisition, or the Lot of Daimon falls into the Lot of Treachery or the Lot of Theft., then The native's life will be characterized by violence, cunning, or some form of villainy.

If If the lords of the Lot of Fortune, Lot of Acquisition, Lot of Daimon, Lot of Treachery, and Lot of Theft are in the same sign or degree., then Violence, cunning, or villainy will characterize the native's life.

If If the lord of the Lot of Treachery or the Lot of Theft aspects the Lot of Fortune, or the Lot of Daimon, or the Lot of Acquisition., then The affairs of the native's life will be found to stem from treachery or theft.

If If benefics bear witness to the Lot of Treachery or the Lot of Theft, especially if they are in their own sect or in their own place., then The native's affairs related to treachery or theft become acceptable or chosen.

If If malefics bear witness to the Lot of Treachery or the Lot of Theft by opposition or square., then The manner of the native's life or affairs related to treachery or theft is clearly negative or difficult.

If If the Lot of Honor and Reputation has opposing malefics not appropriate to the sect of the nativity, OR its lord is not witnessed by Jupiter, especially when fixed stars are declining or the Moon is cadent., then There will be a downfall of glory and reputation.
If If the lord of the Lot of Fortune opposes the Lot of Reputation or the lord of the Lot of Reputation., then It makes the native's glory and reputation unstable or precarious.
If If the lord of the Lot of Daimon and the Lots themselves (e.g., Lot of Fortune, Lot of Reputation) are hostile to each other., then They cause a downfall of glory.
If If the Lot of Reputation and the Lot of Honor are in opposition and are opposed by malefics., then There will be a downfall of glory and reputation.

If The Lord of the Ascendant and the Lord of the Midheaven are in opposition to each other, OR their Lots (Parts) or their Dispositors are in opposition., then Those born are in disgrace/condemnation.
If Jupiter is on the Ascendant, angular, OR becomes lord of an angle., then Makes prominent men.
If Mars is in the sign of the Lot of Fortune, OR the Lot of Fortune is in a sign ruled by Mars., then Those born rule over deaths.
If Angular or succedent places and planets are found in financial/money-making signs., then Make brilliant, leadership, royal nativities.
If Planets/places are in succedent signs/houses., then Make learned, successful, ruling (archons).
If Planets/places are in cadent signs/houses., then Make fortunate, practical, placed under someone's authority, worthy of trust and order.
If The Lot of Fortune, Lot of Spirit, and Lot of Basis fall into the same place., then Fortunate, leading, tyrannical, possessing royal fortune and established in great abundance.

If Venus rules the triplicity and culminates (is on the Midheaven) in Cancer, AND the lord of the triplicity and the lord of the Ascendant are benefic in their placement/condition., then Fortunate, leading, tyrannical, possessing royal fortune and established in great abundance.
If The planets are well-placed (in their own domicile or exaltation)., then Leading, fortunate, and lord of death.
If The lords of the triplicity are angular and on the Ascendant, AND the Lot of Fortune, Lot of Spirit, Lot of Basis, and the Ascendant fall into the same place., then Leading, tyrannical.
If Mars is peregrine and without testimony (un-witnessed) in the 3rd house, in opposition., then Exile and violence.
If Sun, Jupiter, and Venus in Pisces; Moon in Libra; Mars in Cancer; Mercury in Aquarius; Saturn in Scorpio; and the Ascendant in Leo., then Such a person is powerful and authoritative.
If The Sun is guarded by benefics AND found near the Lot of Fortune with its ruler., then Contributes to a powerful and authoritative nature.
If The co-rulers of the triplicity are badly placed (fall) AND the ruler of the Lot of Spirit is retrograde., then The person becomes unfortunate and lives badly.
If Mars opposed the Lot of Acquisition AND the ruler of the exaltation did not have a suitable place, but was overcome by Saturn., then The person becomes unfortunate.
If Most planetary configurations OR the rulers of the triplicity are found in suitable places., then They will be born in glory and splendor of life.
If Some planets/rulers are badly placed (fall) AND others are found in suitable places., then The matters of the Lot of Spirit and Lot of Fortune are without effort (easy).
If Planets are in the first house (Ascendant)., then They rule the first period of life.
If Planets are in the Midheaven, Descendant, or IC., then They rule periods of life after those in the first house.
If The angular houses (Ascendant, Midheaven, Descendant, IC) are empty of planets., then Planets in the succeedent houses rule the periods of life.
If The succeedent houses are also empty of planets., then Planets in the cadent houses rule the periods of life, and even if they are not so strong, they will manage affairs.
If Among planets in cadent houses, those that have declined from the Ascendant or Midheaven., then They rule the first period among the cadent house rulers.
If Among planets in cadent houses, those that are not immediately declined from the Ascendant or Midheaven., then They rule periods after those immediately declined from the Ascendant or Midheaven.
If If both the lord of the period and the lord of the revolution are well-disposed., then The matters of the times will be glorious and desirable.
If If both the lord of the period and the lord of the revolution are of a middle disposition., then The matters of the times will be of a middle nature.
If If both the lord of the period and the lord of the revolution are ill-disposed., then The nativity will be uneven from beginning to end, or will be surrounded by sorrows and dangers.

If Unless the Lot of Fortune or its lord is favorably configured in good fortune and glory according to its own substance., then The nativity will be established (i.e., not uneven, sorrowful, or dangerous).
planets: Lord of the Lot of Fortune

text: If If from the revolutions and periods, such times coincide with the operations of benefic or malefic stars., then Both good and bad things will happen at that time.
If If someone has the malefics in the times (χρόνους)., then It will make the nativity in exiles and troubles.
If The luminaries are setting., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If Mars sees the Lot of Fortune in the cadent house of the Midheaven., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If The Moon or most of the planets are in the subterranean hemisphere., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If The lord of Fortune is found in the Lot of Foreigners or its place., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If There is an opposition (diameter) to the Lot of Foreigners or its place., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If Fortune itself is near where the Lot of Exile is., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If Mars is superimposing or seeing the Lot of Exile., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If The Lot of Foreigners is calculated from Saturn to Mars and the same from the Ascendant., then Makes nativities immobile.
If The Moon is about foreign places AND the Lot of Foreign Travel is opposite OR square., then The nativity is made in foreign lands or exile.
If The Moon is in the lower hemisphere (underground hemisphere)., then It makes many exiles.
If The Lot of Foreign Travel falls into the Ascendant OR the Midheaven OR the 11th house (anaphora of the Midheaven)., then It makes many exiles for nativities.
If The nativity is not exilic by nature OR has the aforementioned figures (configurations) AND does NOT have opposing malefics., then Those born will have few exiles.
If The underground houses (1st-6th) have the rulers of the times OR the planetary rulers, WITHOUT the 12th OR 9th house., then They do NOT give exiles.
If The underground houses (1st-6th) have the rulers of the times, especially if the Lot of Foreign Travel also falls into the underground houses., then It gives exiles.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel have malefics standing over them OR opposing them., then They produce frequent exiles.
If The ruler of the Lot of Foreign Travel is NOT opposing the rulers of the times in the zodiac., then The nativity will be made in exile.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel fall into an underground angle (4th house)., then It makes many exiles.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel fall into an underground angle (4th house) AND are observed by a malefic., then It makes many exiles.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel fall into an underground angle (4th house) AND are afflicted., then It makes many exiles.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel fall into an underground angle (4th house) AND are combust (under light)., then It makes many exiles.
If The ruler of the times falls into one of the allotted signs., then It causes falls (downfalls).
If The ruler of the times falls into one of the allotted signs AND has an opposing malefic., then It causes falls (downfalls).
If The ruler of the times falls into one of the allotted signs AND the Lights (Sun/Moon) are obscured., then It causes falls (downfalls).
If The ephemeris is weak OR there is an opposing Lot., then The nativity will have temporary exile.
If Superior planets (Mars, Jupiter, Saturn) are in the underground and moist places, having ephemerides., then They make exiles.
If Superior planets (Mars, Jupiter, Saturn) are in the underground and moist places AND the Lights (Sun/Moon) are overlying the signs., then They make exiles.
If Superior planets (Mars, Jupiter, Saturn) are in the underground and moist places AND malefics are involved., then They make exiles.
If The Lord of the Year (profectional lord) transits specific signs (implied as fixed or obstructive), then Prevents departure or travel
If The Moon is in a cadent house falling away from the Ascendant in watery signs, with no benefic planet aspecting or present, then The native departs or travels abroad
If The Chronocrator (Lord of the Times) hands over the year to the Lord of the Lot of Travel while a malefic planet aspects it, then Travel or departure occurs, potentially with difficulty
If The Sun (representing the father) is afflicted by Mars or Saturn while benefics are absent, then The father dies before the mother
If The Moon or Venus (representing the mother) is afflicted by Mars or Saturn while benefics are absent, then The mother dies before the father
If Both luminaries (Sun and Moon) and Venus are afflicted by malefics, then The parent associated with the luminary of the sect or the one most afflicted dies first
If The Paternal Lot falls in a masculine sign, then The father dies before the mother
If The lord of the Paternal Lot is aspected by a malefic planet, then The father dies before the mother
If The Maternal Lot falls in a feminine sign, then The mother dies before the father
If A calculated point (days from epoch to birth mod 12, projected from the Moon) falls in a masculine sign, then The father dies before the mother
If A calculated point (days from epoch to birth mod 12, projected from the Moon) falls in a feminine sign, then The mother dies before the father
If Sun overcomes the Moon, then The mother dies before the father
If Moon overcomes the Sun, then The father dies before the mother
If Sun and Moon are unaspected and neither overcomes the other, then Take Saturn and Venus as significators for the parents
If Sun and Moon are unaspected and Saturn and Venus are not available, then Take Saturn and the Moon as significators for the parents
If Sun overcomes and Venus is positioned between the significators, then Venus intervenes in and modifies the overcoming
If Moon and Venus are afflicted by the two malefics (Saturn and Mars), then The mother dies before the father
If Saturn is in Cancer at night, rules the Sun's domicile, and is aspected by Jupiter and Venus, then The native receives the paternal inheritance
If Parental significators are in their own houses or exaltations and are aspected by a benefic, then The parents are noble, famous, and distinguished
If Parental significators are aspected by a malefic (destructive planet), then The parents are obscure and ignoble
If By day, the Sun, the sign the Sun is in, the ruler of the sign Jupiter is in, and the sign containing Jupiter, then These are the significators for the father
If The sign of the Moon, the ruler of the Moon, and by day, Venus and her sign, then These are the significators for the mother
If Mars with the Sun in square aspect to Saturn, then Causes orphanhood
If Saturn and Mars configured as vespertine (evening stars) without the aspect or oversight of Jupiter, then The native becomes an orphan of both parents
If Saturn with Jupiter while Jupiter is setting (occidental/under the beams), then Causes orphanhood
If Moon in a double-bodied sign and witnessed by Jupiter, then The native loses their father (becomes fatherless)
If Moon is underground (in the 4th house) or in the house of Mars, and Jupiter witnesses from his own house, then The native loses their father
If Saturn is the significator of the father, then The father is gloomy, envious, deeply wicked, malicious, filthy, secretive, overwhelmed by passions, unseemly, and a friend of the great
If Jupiter is the significator of the father, then The father is a lover of good, bright, generous, relaxed, and cheerful
If Mars is the significator of the father, then The father is bold, irascible, headstrong, abusive, reckless, much-moved, much-endangered, drunken, and wretched
If Moon is afflicted and Mars or Venus is the domicile master of the Moon, then The mother is rough, an adulteress, and troubled by diseases of the blood or corruption
If Venus witnesses the luminaries (Sun or Moon), then The parents are cheerful, music-lovers, merry, affectionate, and religious
If Mercury is the significator of the parents, then The parents are social, economical, skilled in reason or science, but often lying or erring with inferior persons
If Sun is in a masculine sign and witnessed by a masculine planet, then The father is noble
If Sun is in a feminine sign and witnessed by the Moon, then The father is relaxed and effeminate in mind
If Sun is in a feminine sign witnessed by Saturn and Venus, then The father is unhealthy or of doubtful/ambiguous parentage
If Moon is in a feminine sign and witnessed by masculine planets, then The mother is irascible and uncontrollable
If Moon is in a feminine sign and witnessed by Jupiter, then The mother is gentle and philanthropic
If Mars and Saturn interpose between the luminaries (Sun and Moon) or fall between the planets receiving them, then Causes the separation of the parents
If One luminary is according to the sect and the other is contrary to the sect, and a malefic planet is present with the one contrary to the sect, then Causes the separation of the parents
If Saturn is with the Sun and the Moon is alienated (not in aspect), then Causes the separation of the parents
If Saturn is positioned with the Sun while the Moon is alienated (not in aspect or reception), then Separation of the parents
If The Lord of the Ascendant is cadent or afflicted, and the co-dispositor is fallen, then Parents will be separated; the native will face instability, misfortune, and loss of parental inheritance
If The luminaries (Sun and Moon) and their dispositors are in harmonious aspect to each other, then The parents are in harmony
If The dispositor of the Sun is in harmony with the Moon, and the dispositor of the Moon is in harmony with the Sun, then The parents are in harmony
If The birth occurs during a waxing or new moon and a malefic planet is at the degree of the first full moon in a feminine sign, then The mother will die before the father
If The birth occurs during a waxing or new moon and a malefic planet is at the degree of the first full moon in a masculine sign, then The father will die before the mother
If The birth occurs during a full moon and a malefic planet is at the degree of the next new moon in a feminine sign, then The mother will die before the father
If The birth occurs during a full moon and a malefic planet is at the degree of the next new moon in a masculine sign, then The father will die before the mother
If The Sun is located in the lower hemisphere (under the earth), then The father will likely die abroad
If Saturn is cadent from the angles while Mars applies to or witnesses Saturn, Jupiter, or the Sun, then The father will die abroad
If In a night birth, the Moon is above the earth and afflicted, or the Moon is cadent and afflicted by a malefic, then The mother will die before the father
If The Sun and its dispositor do not aspect the Ascendant, then The father will die abroad
If The Sun is afflicted by a malefic and Jupiter is overcome (by a malefic), then The father will suffer a violent death
If Saturn alone afflicts the indicators of the father, then Death by suffocation, dropsy, cold, poisoning, shipwreck, or old matters
If Mars alone afflicts the indicators of the father, then Death by iron/surgery, bites, hemorrhage, fire, or falls
If Both Saturn and Mars afflict the indicators of the father, then A violent death according to the nature of the planetary combination
If The place of the phase or the lord of the phase is cadent or afflicted by malefics, then The native will be of ignoble birth or, if born in glory, will be suddenly cast down
If The phase is found in an angle and its lord is witnessed by benefics, then The native will be noble and famous
If The place is in a profitable house but the lord is cadent or afflicted by malefics, then Born free or well-reared, the native will fall into reversals, subordination, and poverty

If The lord is in a profitable house but the place is cadent, especially if benefics aspect the lord, then Suffering and subordination in early life followed by freedom, progress, prosperity, and glory
If Both the place and the lord are cadent and both are afflicted by malefics, then The native will be an outcast or captive and experience subordination

If The place and lord are cadent and afflicted by malefics, but benefics are present or witness the configuration, then Release from subordination after the period of the malefics, followed by abundance
If The place is guarded by malefics but the lord is guarded by benefics, then Born as a subordinate but will become free or live in a state of support and adoption
If The place is guarded by benefics but the house-ruler is guarded by malefics, then Born free but will be reared into slavery or fall into subordination at the peak of their prime

If Moon in conjunction with the Sun (Synodos), then Signifies glory, power, royal and tyrannical dispositions, public affairs of cities, parents, marriages, mysteries, and universal or mundane matters.
If The Lord of the Conjunction (Synodos), its latitude, and its course, then Signifies the same matters as the conjunction itself: glory, power, and public affairs.
If The rising of the Moon (first appearance of light) and its Lord, then Signifies matters concerning life, action, and future substance; it confirms the actions initiated at the conjunction.
If Mercury with the Moon up to 4 degrees from the rising of light, then Strengthens the significations of the Moon's rising regarding life and action.
If Moon in Crescent phase (Menoiedes), then Signifies upbringing, things hoped for in life, and matters concerning women and the mother.
If Mercury with the Moon up to 8 degrees during the Crescent phase, then Strengthens the significations of the crescent phase regarding upbringing and women.
If Moon in First Dichotomy (First Quarter), then Signifies praise, suffering, violent occurrences, children, dignity, and future good things.
If Venus configured with the Moon up to 12 degrees during the first dichotomy, then Influences the significations of the first quarter, particularly regarding children and dignity.
If Moon in Gibbous phase (Amphikyrtos), then Signifies happiness, future progress, travel abroad, and the sympathy of relatives.
If Sun with the Moon up to 14 degrees during the gibbous phase, then Strengthens the significations of happiness and progress.
If Full Moon (Panselenos), then Signifies glory and infamy, travel abroad, violent events, those falling from high positions or rising from low ones, sympathies, sufferings, and political rivalries.
If The Lord of the Moon's decrease of light (Waning phase), then Signifies the decrease of possessions, decline in practical affairs, humiliation, and sudden falls.
If Mars as Lord of the Moon's waning up to 20 degrees, then Equivalent to the setting of light; signifies decline, loss of property, and sudden falls.
If Moon in Second Gibbous phase (Waning Gibbous), then Signifies living abroad, greater action, and happiness.
If Jupiter as Lord of the Moon up to 25 degrees during the second gibbous phase, then Strengthens the significations of happiness and successful action abroad.
If Moon in Second Dichotomy (Last Quarter), then Signifies old matters, long-lasting sufferings, and children.
If Jupiter is the lord and is in conjunction or significant phase with the Moon, then Prosperity and happiness

If Saturn is the lord during the second dichotomy (half-moon phase) until the 30th day, then Concerns regarding ancient matters, long-term sufferings or chronic illnesses, and matters involving children
If The lord of the crescent moon phase is active, then Signifies the death of a woman
If The lord of the crescent moon phase is active, then Loss of property or plunder
If The setting (occidental position) of the Moon or its lord, then Imprisonment, constraints, secret affairs, condemnation, and loss of status or dishonor
If The five planets and the Sun are located in difficult or 'unjust' centers (angles), then General misfortune or malefic results regarding the life path
If Malefics are present in the Lot of Fortune (1st house from the Lot), then Ailments or suffering related to the chest
If Malefics are present in the 2nd house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the side (pleura)
If Malefics are present in the 3rd house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the belly
If Malefics are present in the 4th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the hips
If Malefics are present in the 5th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the genitals
If Malefics are present in the 6th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the thighs
If Malefics are present in the 7th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the knees
If Malefics are present in the 8th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the shins
If Malefics are present in the 9th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the feet
If Malefics are present in the 10th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the head
If Malefics are present in the 11th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the face and neck
If Malefics are present in the 12th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the forearms and shoulders
If Malefics are present in the Lot of Spirit (1st house from the Lot), then Ailments or suffering related to the heart
If Malefics are present in the 2nd house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the inner belly
If Malefics are present in the 3rd house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the seminal tracts and kidneys
If Malefics are present in the 4th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the gall
If Malefics are present in the 5th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the liver
If Malefics are present in the 6th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the second belly
If Malefics are present in the 7th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the bladder
If Malefics are present in the 8th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the intestines
If Malefics are present in the 9th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the membranes, teeth, and hearing
If Malefics are present in the 10th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to swallowing and the throat
If Malefics are present in the 11th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the tongue
If Malefics are present in the 12th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the stomach
If The Moon is considered in the chart, then It signifies the Lot of Fortune and the physical body
If The Sun is considered in the chart, then It signifies the mind and the Lot of Spirit

If Aries is the sign under consideration for health, then Signifies the head and sense organs; causes headaches, cataracts, apoplexy, scars, dimness of vision, lepra, lichen, spasms, alopecia, baldness, loss of sensation, rot, condylomas, and fleshy growths
If Taurus is the sign under consideration for health, then Signifies the neck, face, swallowing, sense of smell, and nose; causes hunching (kyphosis) and lameness
If Aries (implied by context of head/start), then Headaches, blindness, leprosy, baldness, and ailments of the ears and teeth.
If Taurus, then Ailments of the neck, face, swallowing, and nose; curvature or lameness of the feet.
If Taurus (specifically the Pleiades), then Dangerous eye pains, blindness, or vision impairment.
If Taurus, then Inclination toward servitude or shameful acts; spasms, anthrax-like sores, and nasal polyps.
If Taurus, then Falls from heights or four-footed animals, broken limbs, and sciatica.
If Gemini, then Ailments of the shoulders, hands, fingers, joints, and nerves.
If Gemini (when afflicted), then Attacks by robbers or enemies, wounds, falls from heights, and amputations.
If Cancer, then Ailments of the chest, stomach, and spleen; hidden diseases.
If Cancer (specifically the Nebula/Praesepe), then Blindness or vision impairment.
If Cancer, then Leprosy, dropsy originating from the spleen, tooth decay, and squinting eyes.
If Cancer, then Harm from aquatic creatures, coughing, and lung diseases.

If Mars in Taurus is positioned upon the Lot of Fortune, opposing the Lot of Daemon, while the Moon is in the death-bringing place (Sagittarius) overcome by Saturn, then Violent death (beheading)

If Saturn, Mercury, and Mars are together in Gemini (the Lot of Fortune) as destroyers (anairetai) witnessed by the Moon, while Jupiter is in its fall in the death-bringing place (Capricorn), then Beheading
If Saturn in Taurus, Moon in Aquarius, and the Ascendant in Aries, then Death by hanging
If The lords of the Lot of Fortune and the death-bringing place oppose each other in watery signs, with Mars at its setting (occidental), then Death in a bath
If Mars in Leo (a fiery sign) on the Lot of Fortune opposes the Ascendant, while Saturn and Mercury overcome the death-bringing place, then Drowning
If The Moon is on the Lot of Fortune overcome by Mars and opposing the Sun, while Saturn is in the death-bringing place (Taurus), then Killed by iron or a sword
If Saturn as lord of the death-bringing place is aspected by Venus, while Mars is in the Ascendant in opposition., then Death by poison.
If The Moon is aspected by Saturn and Mars, and the Lord of the Daemon (Spirit) and the Full Moon are in opposition., then Death in a well or water-tank.
If Saturn is the lord of death and overcomes Mercury (lord of the Lot of Fortune) and the Moon, while Mars opposes the death-bringing place., then Death by hanging (suicide).
If The lord of the Lot of Fortune is with Mars in the 7th house (Dysis), Saturn (lord of the Full Moon) is averted, and Mars opposes the death-bringing place., then Death by beheading.
If Malefics (Saturn and Mars) are in diametrical opposition to each other., then Violent death, or falling from glory to dishonor, or suffering the same punishments they inflicted on others.
If A planet is in opposition to another planet or to the Ascendant, then The native experiences sudden loss of accumulated wealth, grief, and the necessity of yielding to others against their will.
If A planet is in opposition to its own domicile, triplicity, or terms, then Instability in life, accompanied by envy, plots, betrayal, and physical distress.
If The lords of the triplicities or the lords of the sects are in opposition to one another, then The native's life will be most bad and unstable.
If The Sun is in Leo or the Moon is in Cancer, and either is in the Ascendant or Midheaven or appropriately configured, then That luminary becomes the predominator (Hyleg).
If The Sun is in the Ascendant while the Moon is in the twelfth house (the Bad Daimon), then The Sun takes the predominance.
If The Sun is in the eleventh house (the Good Daimon) and the Moon is in the Midheaven, then The Sun takes the predominance.
If Both the Sun and the Moon are found in the terms of a single planet, then That planet is indisputably the Lord of the Chart (Oikodespotes).
If Both Sun and Moon fail to meet the criteria for predominance, then The lordship of the chart is determined by the terms of the degree of the Ascendant or the Midheaven.
If The Sun is at night or the Moon is by day, but they are in appropriate figures, then They may still be granted the predominance.
If Both the Sun and the Moon are located within the bounds (horia) of the same planet, then That planet is indisputably designated as the ruler of the chart (oikodespotes)
If The Sun is in the Ascendant (Horoskopos) while the Moon is in the 12th House (kakodaimon), then The Sun prevails as the predominant planet (epikratesei)
If The Sun is in the 11th House (agathodaimon) while the Moon is in the Midheaven (mesouranema), then The Sun prevails as the predominant planet
If The Sun is in the 9th House (apoklima of the Midheaven) while the Moon is in the Ascendant (Horoskopos), then The Moon prevails as the predominant planet
If The Sun is in the 9th House (apoklima of the Midheaven) while the Moon is in the 2nd House (succedent to the Ascendant), then The Moon prevails as the predominant planet
If The Sun is in the 9th House (apoklima of the Midheaven) while the Moon is in the Midheaven (10th House), then The Moon prevails as the predominant planet
If The Sun is in the 9th House (apoklima of the Midheaven) while the Moon is in the 11th House (succedent to the Midheaven), then The Moon prevails as the predominant planet
If The Moon is in the 9th House (apoklima of the Midheaven) while the Sun is in the 4th House (IC/hypogeion), then The Sun prevails as the predominant planet
If The Moon is in the 9th House (apoklima of the Midheaven) while the Sun is in the 5th House (succedent to the IC), then The Sun prevails as the predominant planet
If The Sun is in the 9th House (apoklima of the Midheaven) while the Moon is in the 5th House (succedent to the IC), then The Moon prevails as the predominant planet
If The Sun is in the 9th House (apoklima of the Midheaven) while the Moon is in the 4th House (IC/hypogeion), then The Moon prevails as the predominant planet
If Both luminaries (Sun and Moon) are cadent from the Midheaven (9th House), then The Ascendant (Horoskopos) prevails and the lord of its bounds is the ruler
If The Sun and Moon are both in the 3rd House (cadent from the Ascendant), then The Midheaven (10th House) prevails and the lord of its bounds is the ruler
If By day, the luminaries are in the hemisphere above the earth, then The Ascendant prevails and the lord of the degrees is the ruler
If By night, the luminaries are cadent below the earth, then The Midheaven prevails as the predominant point
If The Sun and Moon are both in the 7th House (setting place), then The bound of the preceding syzygy (conjunction or opposition) prevails and its lord is the ruler
If The Sun and Moon are both in the 1st, 10th, or 4th House, then The bound of the preceding syzygy prevails and its lord is the ruler
If The Sun is in its fall (Libra), then It cannot be the Apheta (Hyleg) unless it is exactly on the Ascendant degree
If The Moon is in Scorpio, then It cannot be the Apheta (Hyleg)
If The Moon is in conjunction with the Sun and under its rays (combust), then It does not become the Apheta (Hyleg)
If The lord of the bounds (terms) of the predominant place is found in the same sign or another, then It will be the ruler (oikodespotes) of the nativity without fail
If Sun is found in its own depression (fall), then It will not be the releaser (aphetes)
If Sun is in its fall but exactly on the degree of the Ascendant, then It can be the releaser (aphetes)
If Moon is found in Scorpio, then It will not be the releaser (aphetes)
If Moon is conjunct the Sun or under the Sun's rays (combust), then It will not be the releaser (aphetes)
If Moon is under the rays of the Sun but exactly on the degree of the Ascendant, then It can be the releaser (aphetes)
If Full Moon is within the bound of the Ascendant, then It acts as the releaser (aphetes) and the destroyer (anairetes)
If The distance in degrees between the Moon and the Full Moon point is calculated, then The number of degrees equals the number of years the native will live
If A malefic planet casts its ray or opposes the sign of the releaser, then Death will occur
If A benefic planet aspects the sign of the releaser while a malefic also aspects, then Death will not occur, but there will be illness or suffering
If Sun and Moon witness the lord of the bounds and it is in an angular house, then The dominion (predominance) of the ruler is confirmed and stable
If The lord of the bounds is found cadent (apostrophos), then The nativity will be without a ruler (anoikodespotes)
If The lord of the solar or lunar sign and the lord of the bounds are in mutual reception (interchanged), then The rulership will be ineffective or unstable
If Benefic planets are located in operative (chrematistikai) degrees, then They become more beneficent and effective in producing good results
If Malefic planets are located in operative (chrematistikai) degrees, then They become more powerful in their capacity to cause harm or malice
If Planets are located in inoperative (achrematistoi) or inactive (apraktoi) degrees, then They are rendered ineffective and cannot fulfill their natural significations
If Degrees fall within the first third of the distance from the Ascendant to the IC (Hypogeion), then These degrees are operative (chrematistikon) and powerful (dunastikon)
If Degrees fall within the second third of the distance from the Ascendant to the IC (Hypogeion), then These degrees are middling (meson), being neither especially good nor especially bad
If Degrees fall within the final third of the distance from the Ascendant to the IC (Hypogeion), then These degrees are causative of evil (aitiatikon) and bad (phaulon)
If Degrees are in opposition (diametros) to operative or inoperative degrees, then They share the same quality (operative or inoperative) as the degrees they oppose
If Planets are located in the succedent house (epanaphora) of the Midheaven, known as the Good Daimon, then They are considered operative and beneficial
If Degrees are falling away (apokeklikuias) from the Ascendant, then They are down-bringing (katotikon) and inoperative (achrematiston)
If The Sun or the Moon is found in the aphetic (releasing) place, then The length of life is calculated from the aphetic degree to the square aspect according to the ascensional times of the climate

If The ruler (oikodespotēs) is in its own terms (horia) and is well-configured to the releaser (aphetēs), and no destructive planet (anairetēs) casts a ray, then The full number of years is granted without subtraction
If The ruler is not testifying to the predominator but is well-configured in the Ascendant or Midheaven and is oriental, then The ruler distributes its full years
If The ruler is found in the other angles (pivots) besides the Ascendant or Midheaven, then The ruler distributes the remaining years after a subtraction is made based on the ratio of association

If The years of the releaser (aphetēs) are fewer than the years of the ruler (oikodespotēs), then The years of the releaser prevail and the birth is considered to be without a ruler (anoikodespotētos)
If The predominator and the ruler are both well-disposed, then Each distributes its own specific years to the life span
If A planet is in the place of the Good Daimon (11th house), then It is considered beneficial and productive of good
If A planet is in the place falling from the Ascendant (12th house), then It is considered bad, down-falling, and unconfigured
If A planet is in opposition to the Good Daimon or the Bad Daimon, then It shares in the nature and influence of those specific places
If The lord of the house (oikodespotes) is in its own place or in a sympathetic configuration, then It grants its own specific years of life
If The lord of the house is located in the Midheaven (10th house), the Good Spirit (11th house), or a productive (chrematistikos) place, then It grants the full or complete number of years

If Neither the Sun nor the Moon occupy the releasing place (aphetikos topos), but the Ascendant or Midheaven does, then The years of life are calculated based on the distance from the releasing degree to the next angular point (kentron)

If A killing planet (anairetes) casts a ray or is present at a degree between the releaser and the completion of the quadrant, then The number of years is cut short and determined by the distance to that killing planet's position
If The releasers (Sun or Moon) are supported by the testimony of the lord of the house who is well-situated and capable, then The full allotment of years is granted
If The aphetic point (release) is witnessed by its domicile lords who are well-placed and capable of giving their full years, then The release reaches its full completion and term

If Calculating the aphesis (release) by treating the aphetic degree as the Midheaven (MC) to determine the rising degree for the specific climate, then The release period is determined by the distance between the aphetic degree and the resulting Ascendant
If The destructive (anairetic) or aphetic degree is treated as the Ascendant to find the culminating degree, then The release is directed toward that culminating degree or its diameter (opposition)
If The years calculated for the releaser (aphetos) exceed the years granted by the domicile lord (oikodespotes), then The lifespan of the native is limited to the years granted by the domicile lord

If The Ascendant is at Sagittarius 18 degrees and the Midheaven is at Libra 4 degrees, with Mercury as domicile lord in Virgo at 13 degrees, then Mercury acts as the lord of the house and determines the temporal distribution (merismos) of the life

If The Moon is the releaser (aphetos) in Libra at 11 degrees, then The release is calculated through the remaining degrees of Libra, then through Scorpio and Sagittarius to determine the total years of the period

If The years of the apheta (releasor) are found to be greater than the years of the oikodespotes (lord of the nativity), then The life expectancy of the nativity will be equal to the number of years distributed by the oikodespotes
If The years of the apheta are less than the years of the oikodespotes due to an anairetic (killing) ray, then The nativity will live only for the duration of the years indicated by the apheta

If The oikodespotes is found to be angular (pivotal), oriental, or located on profitable degrees while the aphesis is increasing, then The oikodespotes grants its full years, and anairetic or ray-casting planets will not be able to subtract from the lifespan

If The nativity is found to have no oikodespotes (lord of the house) for the aphesis, then One must observe the conjunctions of the anairetic planets or their testimonies by sextile, trine, square, or opposition
If Saturn, Mars, the Sun, or the Moon (when waning/moving toward setting) act as anairetai (killers), then They function as life-ending factors in the nativity
If A point falls within the aphetic bounds (terms) or the bounds of malefic planets, then These locations are considered anairetic (killing) places
If A degree is within 3 degrees on either side of the aphesis (release point), then The degree possesses the power of the presence of the aphesis and acts as an anairetic point
If Malefic planets cast rays toward anairetic points, then They act as killers (anairetai)
If Benefic planets cast rays toward anairetic points, then They act as preventers (kolytai) of the destruction/death
If A malefic planet casts a ray to the aphetic degree or to the degrees of its square side, then Destruction or death occurs at that specific degree in the sequence of signs
If Anairetic planets are angular (pivotal) or succedent, then They become more powerful and effective in their killing nature
If Anairetic planets are cadent (out of pivot), then They become weak and less effective as killers
If Saturn is in Sagittarius and casts a trine ray to the Ascendant in Aries, hitting angular or profitable degrees, then Saturn acts as an anairetic (killer) despite the trine aspect
If Planets are located in angles (kentron) or succedent (epanaphora) houses, then The planets become more powerful and effective
If Planets are located in cadent (ekklitai) houses, then The planets become weak and ineffective

If Saturn is in Sagittarius at 12, 13, or 20 degrees while Aries is the Ascendant, casting a trine to the Ascendant, then Saturn becomes anairetic (destructive) because it casts a ray to a profitable degree from a cadent position
If Saturn is in Sagittarius at 3 degrees while Aries is the Ascendant, then Saturn is cadent and not anairetic (destructive)
If Sun is at 19 degrees of Aries, then The Sun is in its exaltation
If Moon is at 3 degrees of Taurus, then The Moon is in its exaltation
If Jupiter is at 15 degrees of Cancer, then Jupiter is in its exaltation
If Mars is at 28 degrees of Capricorn, then Mars is in its exaltation
If Saturn is at 21 degrees of Libra, then Saturn is in its exaltation
If Mercury is at 15 degrees of Virgo, then Mercury is in its exaltation
If Venus is at 27 degrees of Pisces, then Venus is in its exaltation
If A planet is in the degree diametrically opposite its exaltation, then The planet is in its depression (fall) and is weakened
If A planet is in the quadrant preceding its exaltation degree, then The planet is designated as Northern
If A planet is in the quadrant following its exaltation degree, then The planet is designated as Southern
If Sun moves from 19 degrees Capricorn to 19 degrees Aries, then The Sun is ascending in the North
If Sun moves from 19 degrees Aries to 19 degrees Cancer, then The Sun is descending in the North
If Sun moves from 19 degrees Cancer to 19 degrees Libra, then The Sun is descending in the South
If Sun moves from 19 degrees Libra to 19 degrees Capricorn, then The Sun is ascending in the South
If Sun is at 22 degrees Aquarius, then The Sun is at the 3rd degree of the Northern ascent
If In any nativity, the Sun, Moon, or Ascendant is identified as the releaser (aphetes), then This determines the wind and direction of the life path
If Planets run the same wind (direction) as the apheta (releasor), then They are familiar, sympathetic, and beneficial, especially during their own time periods
If Planets run the same wind as the apheta and are oriental and angular, then They are superior, more beneficial, and increase the numerical strength or years of the life
If Planets run the same wind as the apheta and are of the same sect (haeresis), then They add to the numerical strength and effectiveness of the prediction
If A star runs the opposite wind to the apheta, then It becomes an enemy and a malefic, especially during the transmission of time periods
If A star runs the opposite wind to the apheta and is occidental and subtracting in numbers, then It is harmful and dangerous
If A star runs the opposite wind to the apheta and is angular, then It will act as a malefic throughout the life
If A star has mixed familiar and unfamiliar configurations (aspects) to the apheta, then It is irregular and not entirely beneficial nor entirely harmful
If The Ascendant is found to be the apheta, then Examine the lord of the terms (bounds) to determine the wind and its condition
If Sun, Jupiter, or Saturn are above the earth during the day, then They rejoice and are more effective
If Sun, Jupiter, or Saturn are below the earth during the night, then They rejoice and are more effective
If Moon, Mars, or Venus are above the earth during the night, then They rejoice and are more effective
If Moon, Mars, or Venus are below the earth during the day, then They rejoice and are more effective
If Mercury is in the terms (bounds) of a specific planet, then It follows the sect of the lord of those terms
If In a day birth, Jupiter, Sun, and Saturn are above the earth and well-configured, then It is better and more favorable than if they were below the earth
If In a night birth, the nocturnal planets (Moon, Mars, Venus) are above the earth, then It is advantageous and favorable
If Venus is at the Ascendant or Midheaven, then She rejoices more and her influence is strengthened
If Planets are at the Ascendant rather than setting (Descendant), then They rejoice more and have greater power
If Jupiter in square aspect to the destructive point or the releasor, then Prevents or delays death (hinders destruction), increasing the years of life
If The direction (aphesis) reaches the opposition of Mars, then Acts as a destroyer (anaireta), causing death
If The direction (aphesis) enters the beginning of a bound (horion) belonging to a malefic planet, then The period becomes destructive or life-threatening
If A destroyer (anaireta) casts a ray to a specific degree or the direction reaches the degree of the ray-caster, then The time is judged as destructive for the native
If The Luminaries (Sun and Moon) are in declining (cadent) houses while the Ascendant is the releasor, then The nativity is considered 'without a house-ruler' (anoikodespotes)
If Sextile, square, or opposition aspects are made to the Ascendant by rising (anafora), then These aspects are judged as effective and active in determining life events and hindrances
If Planets are in succedent houses, signs of equal rising time, signs of equal power, or in antiscia, then The positions are particularly active and must be watched for predictive effects
If Degrees are culminating (MC) relative to the Ascendant and Moon, or are in opposition to those points, then These degrees are judged as 'deadly' (thanatikas) or 'powerful' (dynastikas)
If The Midheaven of the Ascendant and the Moon relative to each other and their oppositions, then Determines deadly and powerful degrees
If Planets in opposition to the Ascendant, Sun, or Moon, then Signifies climacterics and death
If Saturn in opposition to the Ascendant, or in square, or rising with it (isanafora), then Death
If Lords of the terms of opposing degrees reach the places or risings of the Ascendant, then Signifies destruction and death
If Jupiter reaches the terms of the Sun through signs of equal rising (isanafora), then Destruction
If Mars reaches the terms of Venus through signs of equal rising (isanafora), then Death
If Venus reaches the terms of Mercury through signs of equal rising (isanafora), then Death
If Lords of the terms of opposing degrees, then They are considered enemies to one another

If The Sun passes through its own terms (bounds) while the Moon witnesses (aspects) or the lord of those terms witnesses., then The natural quality of the star will blow; specifically, an East wind (Apeliotes) will blow.
If The Sun passes through its own terms while Venus witnesses., then A South wind (Notos) and unsettled weather (aphrosia) will occur.
If The Sun passes through its own terms while Saturn witnesses., then It is a cause of cold moisture.
If The Sun passes through its own terms while Jupiter witnesses., then A North wind (Boreas) and dew (drosos) occur.
If The Sun passes through its own terms while the Moon witnesses (specific variant)., then A North-east wind (Borr-apeliotes) blows.
If The Sun passes through its own terms while Venus witnesses (specific variant)., then A South-east wind (Not-apeliotes), disturbance of winds, and gloom (gnophos) occur.
If The Sun passes through its own terms while Mercury witnesses., then West wind (Lips), North wind, stability, rain (epombria), and it becomes a cause of thunder and lightning.

If The birth is Conjunctional (New Moon); count the degrees from the prenatal conjunction to the Moon and project an equal distance from the Ascendant., then The lord of the term (bound) where the count ends shall be the ruler (oikodespotes) of fortune and life.

If The birth is Full Moon; count the degrees from the prenatal full moon to the next conjunction and project an equal distance from the Ascendant towards the Midheaven., then The lord of the term (bound) where the count ends shall be designated as the ruler (oikodespotes) of the life.

If The Sun has dominion, the sign where the calculation ends is masculine, and the Lord of the Bound is in harmony and well-aspected to the Sun, then The native is granted the greatest number of years of life

If The sign is masculine (Sun-like) but the Lord of the Bound is contrary to the Sun, in a cadent house, or in ecliptic places, then The Lord of the Bound becomes a destroyer of years or grants only the minimum years of life
If The Lord of the Bound is found in suitable and well-aspected signs relative to both the dominator and the Lord of the Sign, then The years of life will be complete and full
If The Lord of the Bound is well-disposed to one significator but inharmonious to the other, then The native is granted the middle or mean number of years of life

If The Lord of the Sign where the calculation ends is inharmonious to the dominator, in aversion, or in the 12th House (Bad Daemon), then The birth is considered to be without a house-lord, implying instability or short life
If The Lord of the Bound and the Lord of the Sign are well-aspected and in harmony with the Sun or Moon, then The release (aphesis) of years is judged from the degree of the bound
If A malefic planet rules the first bound of the release or the Lord of the House is fallen, then The birth is short-lived
If The Lord of the Bound and the Sign are well-aspected and in harmony with the Sun or Moon, then The release (aphesis) is determined from the degree of the Sun
If A malefic planet rules the bound (term) of the release (aphesis), then Short life (oligochronia)
If The lord of the house (oikodespotes) falls away or is poorly situated, then Short life (oligochronia)
If The bound (term) and the sign of the release are well-placed and in harmony with the Sun or the Moon, then Long life (polychronia) and stable livelihood
If Saturn is in opposition and Mars is in square to the point of release (aphesis), while Jupiter is averted and Venus is fallen away, then Death or destruction of the life
If The aphesis (release) reaches the degree of Mars in Scorpio, then Death (end of life)
If Calculation of the days from the rising of Sirius (Sothis) to the birth date to find the climacteric number, then Determination of the 7th and 9th climacteric (critical) years
If The hebdomadic (7-year) climacteric falls into or coincides with the enneadic (9-year) climacteric, then Circumstances and affairs will be discordant and out of harmony

If A climacteric period is discordant or fails to coincide with the calculated number, then It does not have the power to destroy the life or substance, but will cause intermediate distress or wasting away
If A birth occurs at night (nocturnal birth), then The hebdomadic (7-year) climacterics should be sought and prioritized
If A birth occurs during the day (diurnal birth), then The enneadic (9-year) climacterics should be sought and prioritized
If The climacteric period is hebdomadic (based on the number 7), then The period is associated with the influence and nature of Mars
If The climacteric period is enneadic (based on the number 9), then The period is associated with the influence and nature of Saturn
If Saturn's domiciles (Capricorn and Aquarius) are in the 7th position from the Luminaries' domiciles (Cancer and Leo), then Saturn acts as a hebdomadic (7th) opposition to the Sun and Moon
If Mars is related to the 9th position (Aries being 9th from Leo, or Cancer being 9th from Scorpio), then Mars acts as an enneadic (9th) influence
If The hebdomadic climacteric is calculated from the exaltation of the Moon in Taurus, then This is considered a more natural method for determining the beginning of the climacteric years
If Saturn is in the seventh house or sign (hebdomadic) relative to the Sun or the Moon, then It acts as a climacteric (critical/dangerous) period
If Mars is in the ninth house or sign (enneadic) relative to the Sun or the Moon, then It acts as a climacteric (critical/dangerous) period
If Mars is in Scorpio, which is the seventh sign (hebdomadic) from the Moon's exaltation in Taurus, then It creates a hebdomadic climacteric period
If Saturn is in Capricorn, which is the ninth sign (enneadic) from the Moon's exaltation in Taurus, then It creates an enneadic climacteric period
If The climacteric period falls within the Cardinal signs (Aries, Libra, Cancer, Capricorn), then These are classified as hebdomadic (seven-fold) climacteric signs
If The climacteric period falls within the Fixed signs (Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius), then These are classified as enneadic (nine-fold) climacteric signs
If The climacteric period falls within the signs Gemini or Virgo, then These are classified as common or shared (epikoina) climacteric signs
If Analyzing the flow (aporoia) from the New Moon or Full Moon towards the Ascending Node, then Determines the length of life (chronon zoes)
If The syzygy (New Moon) or Full Moon occurs with a separation towards the Ascending Node, then Determines the length of life (chronoi zoes)
If The ray-casting (aktinobolia) of the Lord of the House (Oikodespotes) and the Destroyer (Anairetes) is calculated, then Determines the length of life and identifies destructive and powerful places
If A planet holds predominance (epikratesis) or lordship (oikodespoteia) in the nativity, then It must be examined first to determine the length of life
If The calculation involves the number of the Lot (kleros) and the destructive or powerful places, then Determines the specific length of life and the nature of the end of life
If A birth has a predominant planet (epikratēsis) or a ruler of the chart (oikodespoteia), then One must use the established bounds (horia) for the determination of the length of life

If A birth is without a ruler or predominant planet and is not destroyed by a malefic ray, then Take the distance from the preceding New Moon or Full Moon to the Ascendant or another center to determine the length of life
If The North Node (Anabibazon) or South Node (Katabibazon) is involved in the calculation of the distance, then They act as more powerful factors (dynastikoteros) in the determination of the years

If In a day birth, the calculated number of years exceeds the limit, then Subtract the angular distance from the Ascendant to the Midheaven and project the remainder from the Ascendant toward the Midheaven
If In a night birth, the distance is taken from the New Moon or Full Moon to the North or South Node, then Project the distance from the Ascendant to find the years of life

If In a night birth, the calculated number of years exceeds the limit, then Subtract the distance from the Ascendant to the IC (Hypogeion) and project the remainder from the Descendant (Dysis) toward the Midheaven
If The preceding syzygy was a New Moon (synodic), then The release (aphesis) must be made from the Ascendant
If The preceding syzygy was a Full Moon (panselenic), then The release (aphesis) must be made from the Descendant (Dysis)
If The Ascendant or the Nodes are in square or opposition to the preceding New or Full Moon, then The distance is projected from the Ascendant for day births and from the Descendant for night births
If A point or planet is in square to the North Node (Anabibazon) or South Node (Katabibazon), then It possesses destructive (anairetic) power over the life
If A point or planet is calculated in relation to the Sun in the context of length of life, then It can possess destructive (anairetic) power
If The Ascendant, North Node, or South Node is found in square or opposition to the syzygy (conjunction or full moon), then Destructive influence or determination of the end of life
If Squares to the North Node, then Possesses destructive (anaretic) power
If Degree-based release (aphesis) from the Sun or Moon to the North Node, its opposition, or its squares, then Destructive (anaretic) power leading to the end of life
If The syzygy (conjunction or full moon) is applied to the North Node, South Node, or the Angles (Kentra), then Destruction or death
If The same years of crisis are found approaching from both the time of conception and the time of birth, then Death will occur without doubt
If Sun in square aspect, then Acts as a seminal or generative point for the birth
If Sun in trine aspect while in signs of short ascension, then Acts as a seminal or generative point for the birth
If The Ascendant of the conception is found after the opposition of the seminal Sun, then The birth is classified as a Full Moon birth (panselenia)
If Individual has a syzygical (conjunctional) birth, then Death occurs during a full moon
If Individual has a full moon (panselenia) birth, then Death occurs during a syzygy (conjunction)
If Individual is born during a Full Moon (syzygy), then The individual will die during a Full Moon
If Individual is born during a New Moon (conjunction), then The individual will die during a New Moon
If Diurnal birth where the Ascending Node is near the Ascendant, then Release the calculated number of years/months downwards from the Ascendant
If Nocturnal birth where the Ascending Node is near the Ascendant, then Release the calculated number of years/months upwards toward the Midheaven
If Diurnal birth where the Ascending Node falls in the Midheaven, then Release the calculated number from the Midheaven downwards toward the Ascendant
If Nocturnal birth where the Ascending Node falls in the Midheaven, then Release the calculated number from the Midheaven upwards toward the Descendant
If Diurnal birth where the Ascending Node falls in the Descendant, then Release the calculated number from the Descendant toward the Midheaven
If Nocturnal birth where the Ascending Node falls in the Descendant, then Release the calculated number from the Descendant toward the IC (underground)
If Diurnal birth where the Ascending Node is in the IC (underground), then Release the calculated number from the IC upwards toward the Ascendant
If Nocturnal birth where the Ascending Node is in the IC (underground), then Release the calculated number from the IC toward the Descendant
If The Full Moon of conception and the North Node occur at the same degree in the place of conception, then The native's life path is dangerous and the end of life is violent
If The Lot of Fortune is calculated from the Sun, Moon, and Ascendant, then It possesses the greatest power in the chart and is considered the lord of the whole life

If The distance from the Syzygy (conjunction or opposition of Sun and Moon) to the North Node is projected from the degree of the Ascendant, then Determines the specific number of years and months of the native's life
If The Lot of Fortune calculation is reversed (day vs night) according to the king's (Nechepso's) enigma, then Identifies the true ruler of the nativity and the primary significator of fate
If Diurnal birth (daytime), then Calculate the Lot by taking the distance from the Sun to the Moon and projecting it from the Ascendant.

If Nocturnal birth (nighttime) when the Moon is above the earth (up to 180 degrees from the Sun), then Calculate the Lot by taking the distance from the Moon to the Sun and projecting it from the Ascendant.
If Nocturnal birth (nighttime) after the setting of the Moon, then Calculate the Lot by taking the distance from the Sun to the Moon and projecting it from the Ascendant.

If Determining the length of life (vital time), then Examine the place where the Lot falls, its ruler, and the ruler of that ruler; the vital time is found from these three places and their rulers according to the three bounds.
If Saturn is the ruler of the period, then The planet grants 30 years.
If Jupiter is the ruler of the period, then The planet grants 12 years.
If Mars is the ruler of the period, then The planet grants 15 years.
If Sun is the ruler of the period, then The planet grants 19 years.
If Venus is the ruler of the period, then The planet grants 8 years.
If Mercury is the ruler of the period, then The planet grants 20 years.
If Moon is the ruler of the period, then The planet grants 25 years.
If A planet is in an angle (pivot), then The planet gives its full periods (years) of time.
If A planet is outside an angle (eccentric or cadent), then The planet gives a portion of its years based on the division of its full number.
If Benefics (co-sectaries) are present, witnessing, or in their own signs, then They contribute to the distribution of the years and improve the outcome.
If The Lot or its ruler is in an operative (chrematistikos) sign versus a falling sign, then The time is calculated in days, months, or years depending on the strength and angularity of the place.
If Calculation of mean years (mesa ete) for a planet, then The mean years are found by adding the greatest period and the least period and dividing by two
If Saturn's greatest period is 57 years and least period is 30 years, then The mean years of Saturn are 43.5
If Jupiter's greatest period is 79 years and least period is 12 years, then The mean years of Jupiter are 45.5

If Mercury is the lord of the Ascendant (Virgo) and is located in the 11th house (Agathodaimon) in Cancer, then The native lives 70 years, calculated by adding the rising time of Virgo (38 1/3) and Mercury's specific contribution
If Sun and Mercury in Taurus, Moon in Pisces, Saturn in Scorpio, Jupiter, Mars, and Venus in Aries, with the Ascendant in Gemini, then The native dies in the 40th year of life

If Ascendant in Capricorn, Lot of Fortune in Pisces, and Mars in Aries, then The native lives 72 years, derived from the rising time of Capricorn (20), the period of Jupiter (12) as lord of Fortune, and the period of Mars (40)
If Saturn is positioned in the 5th house (Agathos Tyche), then Saturn is considered the lord of Fortune and is favorably placed
If Sun's mean years calculation, then The Sun is assigned 19 mean years
If Venus's mean years calculation, then Venus is assigned 6 mean years
If Mercury's mean years calculation, then Mercury is assigned 18 mean years
If Mars's mean years calculation, then Mars is assigned 12 mean years
If Saturn is the chronocrator or aphetic point, then The first period (the fourth part of its minimum years) is 7.5 years
If Mars is the chronocrator or aphetic point, then The first period (the fourth part of its minimum years) is 3 years and 9 months
If Venus is the chronocrator or aphetic point, then The first period (the fourth part of its minimum years) is 2 years
If Mercury is the chronocrator or aphetic point, then The first period (the fourth part of its minimum years) is 5 years
If The Sun is the chronocrator or aphetic point, then The first period (the fourth part of its minimum years) is 4 years and 9 months
If The Moon is the chronocrator or aphetic point, then The first period (the fourth part of its minimum years) is 6 years and 3 months
If Jupiter is the chronocrator or aphetic point, then The first period (the fourth part of its minimum years) is 3 years
If Birth occurs at a New Moon (conjunction), then The start of the aphesis (release) is the first planet following the conjunction
If Birth occurs at a Full Moon, then The start of the aphesis (release) is the first planet following the Full Moon
If A planet is a chronocrator or taking over a period, then Its effectiveness is determined by its configuration, whether it is angular or declining, and whether it is oriental or occidental
If Mars is positioned in its own house, then It grants its minimum years (15 years)
If Jupiter is the ruler of Pisces, then It acts as the lord of that sign and its associated periods
If The first cycle of 32 years and 3 months is completed, then The second cycle of time-lords must begin from the fourth aphetic star
If Planets are in a state of sympathy or enmity during a period handover, then The quality of the time period is determined by their natural relationship
If Seeking bodily matters, climacterics, illness, bloodshed, falls, passions, physical health, pleasure, or beauty, then Perform the release of times (aphesis) from the Lot of Fortune
If Seeking matters of action (praxis) or reputation (doxa), then Perform the release of times (aphesis) from the Lot of Spirit
If The time-lord of the Lot is located in an angular (pivotal) house, then The period is powerful, effective, and significant (dynastike)
If The time-lord of the Lot is located in a non-angular (cadent) house, then The period is less effective or lacks power
If Benefic stars occupy or witness (aspect) the sign where the time-release concludes, then A positive judgment and favorable outcome for the matters of that Lot
If Malefic stars occupy or witness (aspect) the sign where the time-release concludes, then A negative judgment, crisis, or difficulty for the matters of that Lot
If Calculating the total days for Saturn's period, then Saturn is assigned 85 days (calculated as 30 doubled, plus half, plus a third)
If Jupiter receives the distribution of days from Saturn, then Jupiter is assigned 12 days
If Venus receives the distribution of days from Saturn, then Venus is assigned 160 days
If Saturn is in the aphesis (time-release), then Consider the sign and the stars present or testifying, and how they are configured to the general ruler of the aphetic times.
If Seeking concerning action (praxis) or reputation (doxa), then Make the aphesis of the times from the Lot of Spirit (Daemon).
If Benefics or malefics are present or testifying to the aphesis of the Lot of Spirit, then The quality and distinction of the native's actions and reputation are determined.
If The Lot of Fortune or its ruler has passed its time, then The Lot of Spirit takes over the distribution of both bodily and active matters.
If The Lot of Spirit or its ruler has passed its time, then The Lot of Fortune takes over the distribution of both bodily and active matters.
If Lot of Spirit and Lot of Fortune are found in the same sign, then Bodily matters are taken from that sign, but active matters are taken from the following sign (epanaphora).
If Nocturnal birth or syzygy (New Moon) occurs in the underworld (IC), then The squares of each lot act as angles or pivots for the time-release.
If Birth occurs at a New Moon (syzygical), then The release is superior to a Full Moon release because the lots are positioned at the Ascendant.
If Birth occurs at a Full Moon, then The release is less effective as the lots are positioned at the Descendant.
If Male birth, then Most releases for action are found from the Lot of Spirit due to the use of reason and trust.
If Female birth, then Releases are primarily from the Lot of Fortune due to preoccupation with the body.
If Birth of an infant (childhood), then The aphesis of times must be made from the Lot of Fortune until the native reaches maturity or the age of action.
If Lot of Fortune is well-placed in infancy, then The native experiences bodily successes such as beauty, grace, size, and comeliness.
If Lot of Fortune is poorly-placed in infancy, then The native suffers from sores, tumors, discharges, eruptions, congenital marks, or physical defects.
If The release of times (aphesis) is calculated from the Lot of Fortune, then Determines physical well-being and bodily characteristics such as beauty, charm, and stature
If The Lot of Fortune is afflicted or poorly placed, then Results in physical ailments, eruptions, congenital defects, marks, or fractures
If The release of times (aphesis) is calculated from the Lot of Spirit (Daemon), then Determines practical actions and intellectual or mental states
If Mars is the general lord of the Lot of Fortune and is located in Aries, then Mars governs the first primary period of 15 years
If Venus distributes sub-periods through Taurus, then The sub-period duration is 8 months
If Mercury distributes sub-periods through Gemini, then The sub-period duration is 20 months
If The Moon distributes sub-periods through Cancer, then The sub-period duration is 25 months
If The Sun distributes sub-periods through Leo, then The sub-period duration is 19 months
If Jupiter distributes sub-periods through Sagittarius, then The sub-period duration is 12 months
If Saturn distributes sub-periods through Capricorn, then The sub-period duration is 30 months
If The time allocation for a specific sign is completed but the total period remains unfinished, then The remaining time is distributed to the sign in opposition (diameter)

If The release (aphesis) is found in Pisces, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Capricorn, or Aquarius, then After 5 years and 5 months, the remaining times are distributed starting from the opposite sign (diametros)
If Leo (a fiery sign) completes its cycle in the distribution of time, then It transfers the remaining time to Aquarius (an airy sign) due to their elemental sympathy
If Aquarius completes its cycle in the distribution of time, then It transfers the remaining time back to Leo
If Cancer (a watery sign) completes its cycle in the distribution of time, then It transfers the remaining time to Capricorn (an earthy sign) due to their mutual sympathy and life-giving nourishment
If Virgo (an earthy sign) completes its cycle in the distribution of time, then It transfers the remaining time to Pisces (a watery sign)
If The Sun is in Aries at the equinox, then The Sun begins the increase of the length of the day
If The Sun is in Libra (the diameter of Aries), then The Sun dissolves the bond and moves toward the decrease of the day
If The Sun is in Capricorn (the diameter of Cancer), then The Sun produces a change toward the night and the decrease of light
If The Moon completes its cycle and reaches the diameter (opposition) of its starting point, then The Moon dissolves the bond (syndesmos)

If Sun and Moon handing over the chronocratorship to Saturn, then Indicative of oppositions, fears, enmities, secret threats, destructions, judgments, loss of dignity, bodily troubles, and sudden falls or shipwrecks
If Sun and Moon handing over to Saturn while benefics witness the outcome, then The negative effects of enmities, fears, and dangers are obscured or diminished
If Mercury in Virgo or Gemini handing over the time-period, then Brings a change of affairs and innovation of actions
If Release of the node when Mercury or the natal places are afflicted and the universal time is contrary, then The change will be for the better and will be indicative of actions
If Release of the node when the natal places are protected by benefic planets, then The time will be good, suitable, and favorable
If Saturn in Capricorn or Aquarius releasing the node to Leo or Cancer, then Indicates a time of action, leading from darkness to light, and becoming more effective for those in power
If Saturn releasing the time-period in relation to intervening stars, then Provides reputations and benefits according to the nature of the intervening stars
If Aquarius as the sign of the time-lord or node release, then Assigns 30 years (half of the Sun's 60-year cycle)
If Capricorn as the sign of the time-lord or node release, then Assigns 25 years (half of the Moon's 50-year cycle)
If Distribution of chronocratorship from angular places to angular places, where the lords are also angular and witnessed by benefics of the proper sect., then A good and notable time-lord period.
If Distribution where the places are angular, but the lords are cadent or witnessed by malefics., then The time period is uneven and troublesome.
If All indicators (places and lords) are found in cadent houses., then The worst time, bringing accusations and financial losses.
