If Benefics are present or witness the distribution during travel or changes of state., then Success in affairs and a profitable life.
If Malefics are present or witness the distribution during travel or changes of state., then Disturbances and losses in foreign lands.
If Jupiter in trine sympathy with the Sun through Sagittarius., then The Sun distributes 79 years (60 half-years of the Great Year plus 19 minimum years).
If Jupiter in trine sympathy with the Moon through Pisces., then The Moon distributes 79 years (54 half-years of the Great Year plus 25 minimum years).
If Mercury in co-lordship with Saturn., then Mercury receives 30 years from Saturn and 19 years from the Sun, totaling 76 years.

If Venus in trine sympathy and nocturnal sect, associated with the Moon and Saturn in Libra., then Venus receives 54 years from the Moon and 30 years from Saturn (due to the exaltation in Libra), totaling 84 years.
If Mars associated with the Moon and the Sun, where the Sun yields to the trine lord Jupiter., then The Moon distributes 54 years and Jupiter distributes 12 years, totaling 66 years.
If All configurations are found in cadent houses (apoklimata), then The time is very bad, bringing accusations and losses
If Benefics are present in cadent houses or witnessed by benefics while in foreign lands, then Success in affairs and living advantageously while abroad
If Malefics are present in cadent houses or witnessed by malefics while in foreign lands, then Disturbances and losses abroad; betrayal by foreigners or slaves
If Planets are found in angles (pivots) or in their own domiciles, then Signifies detentions in certain places or long-term stays
If Mercury or Venus signify travel, then Travels are not long-distance or of long duration
If Saturn, Mars, or the Moon signify travel, then Travels are abroad and dangerous, occurring by land and sea, often in wandering or barbarian places
If The Sun signifies travel, then Travels are distinguished, honorable, and highly active
If Jupiter signifies travel, then Travels are beneficial, involving many friends and a pleasant life abroad
If Bodily time-lords or their domicile lords are in cadent (eccentric) places and witnessed by malefics, then Weakness, bleeding, or physical dangers

If The time-lord of the Lot of Spirit is in a cadent sign and a malefic is present or witnesses the domicile lord of that sign, then Inactivity, misfortune, and mental instability regarding actions and attempts
If The time-lord is in a fiery sign with malefics present or witnessing, then Great exhaustion of the soul and acting inconsistently with one's purpose
If The time-lord or its domicile lord is in an airy sign, then Living in an unstable or failing manner; doing one thing while expecting another
If The time-lord is in an earthy sign, then Bearing hardships nobly and prevailing over most things through intellectual self-control
If The time-lord is in a watery sign, then Possessing a soul easily consoled; success in many undertakings by smoothing over difficulties
If Many planets incline toward the Lot of Fortune or the Lot of Spirit, then That area of the life will be the primary focus of the person's actions and activities
If Mars, Venus, and Mercury are the significators of actions, then They bring about the native's activities and professions
If Saturn is the significator of actions, then Pursuits involving moisture, hardship, manual labor, or allotments
If Saturn and Mars are present while Jupiter is absent, then The native will be lowly and obscure
If Sun and Moon are present with benefics or supported by them, then The native will be famous and prosperous

If Distribution from the Lot of Daemon to the Midheaven of the Lot of Fortune, with the lord of the Lot present and supported by benefics, Sun, or Moon, then The native will be in positions of leadership, great glory, and command, being blessed by many
If Distribution occurring at the Ascendant, Midheaven, or other angles, then Produces glory and reputation
If Places in square aspect to the Lots, then These places are more effective and active in producing results
If Benefics give testimony or support to the distribution, then Success, honor, and progress in the native's activities
If Malefics give testimony to the distribution, then Reversals, losses, and instability of good fortune
If Saturn in Sagittarius during a full moon, then Climacterics, falls from heights, and fractures of limbs
If Release of bodily times (aphesis) through Leo, Virgo, Libra, and Scorpio, then Climacterics, falls from heights, and fractures of limbs
If Time-lord period of Sagittarius with Saturn positioned in the sign, then Shipwrecks and persistent bodily illnesses
If Lord of the Lot of Fortune (Sun) located in Cancer while the Lot is in Leo, then Suffering and ailments related to the chest and stomach
If Mars as time-lord taking over from Sagittarius while Saturn is positioned in Sagittarius, then Death (the end of life)
If The deadly place (Anaretic) in Pisces with the Moon present and Saturn in a superior (overcoming) position, then Death by stomach affliction and cough
If Lord of the Full Moon (Saturn) being turned away (averse/inconjunct), then Violent death
If Active times (aphesis) in Scorpio (Mars) followed by Sagittarius with Saturn present, then Life as an unstable wanderer
If Acquisitive place (Lot of Gain) in Gemini with no benefic aspects and Saturn in opposition, then Consumption and loss of livelihood or wealth

If Time-lord period of Capricorn with Jupiter in the 11th house (Good Daemon), under the rays of the Sun, and aspected by Venus, then Success in public and royal affairs, friendship with governors and kings, and acquisition of wealth
If Malefics taking over a period or providing testimony (aspecting), then Oppositions and irregularities in life

If Saturn in Sagittarius receiving from Capricorn, with Jupiter positioned in the 11th house (Good Daemon) and not combust, while Venus aspects the configuration, then The native performs public and royal deeds, becomes a friend of leaders and kings, and acquires many possessions.
If Malefic planets take over the time-lord period or provide testimony (aspect) during a handover, then The native experiences reversals, irregularities, and setbacks in their affairs.
If Jupiter is found in its own depression (fall) during its time-lord period, then Acquisitions and gains made during this time are not lasting or permanent.

If Aquarius takes over the time-lord period with Mars and Mercury testifying while the benefics are turned away (in aversion), then The native ceases their activities, loses possessions after trusting them to others, and falls into debt and poverty.
If The Moon takes over the time-lord period following a period of loss, then The native recovers some previously lost or entrusted items and receives help from friends.
If Sun in Leo and Mercury in Virgo during a period where malefics testify to these places, then The native suffers condemnation or legal judgment.
If The Lot of Fortune is found in a decline (cadent house) and the triplicity ruler of the Moon is Mars, then Contributes to the native being found in a state of decline or suffering condemnation.
If A general chronocrator is a benefic planet, the Sun, or the Moon, then Glory, leadership, notable offices, benefits, and increase of superiors
If A malefic planet takes over the sub-distribution of time from a general chronocrator, then Bodily weakness or dangers
If A planet taking over the sub-distribution is opposed to the general chronocrator or poorly configured by nativity or transit, then Disturbances, fears, and losses

If The general chronocrator is poorly placed in the nativity or aspected by malefics, then During the sub-distribution days of those malefics, the native will be brought down, endangered, or experience reversals

If The general chronocrator is found in profitable signs and witnessed by benefics during a transit while others take over the sub-distribution, then The native remains unshaken in life and reputation
If The general time-lord (chronocrator) is poorly placed at birth or afflicted by malefics during sub-distributions, then The native will be brought down, face danger, or experience adversity
If The general time-lord (chronocrator) is found in profitable signs and witnessed by benefics during the distribution, then The native will be strengthened in life and reputation and remain unshaken
If Predictive outcomes are derived from the sequences of bounds (terms), small periods, or dodecatemoria in sub-distributions, then The predictions will be false or deceptive

If Predicting outcomes based solely on the sequences of bounds (terms), small periods, dodecatemoria (12th parts), or exaltations without proper time-lord procedures, then The resulting predictions will be false or misleading

If The application of distributive (apportioning) and annual time-lord systems to the changes of the places (houses), then Accurate knowledge of the beginning and end of events and the successful prediction of life changes
If The movement and positions of the Sun, Moon, Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, Venus, and Mercury, then The steering and governance of the entirety of human life and destiny

If Revealing the sacred astrological teachings to the unlearned or failing to guard the tradition, then The practitioner will face an unprosperous life, a blinded mind, and the gods will be unfavorable; the earth and sea will become impassable

If The planets (Sun, Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn) are well-disposed and benefic in the nativity., then Life will be easy, successful, and proceed according to one's plans and reasoning.

If The planets (Sun, Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn) are contrary or poorly disposed., then Obstacles by land and sea, lack of offspring, a blinded and fettered mind, and a life of struggle without good things.

If Calculating the chronocrator of the year by taking the total years from birth, dividing by 12, and using the remainder to count from a starting point (Ascendant or planet)., then The planet at the resulting sign becomes the 'giver' or 'receiver' of the year, determining the annual prediction.
If In the 35th year of life (remainder 11), counting from the Ascendant and Mars located in Virgo., then The year is handed over to Saturn located in Cancer.
If In the 35th year of life (remainder 11), counting from the Moon located in Scorpio., then The year is handed over to Mars located in Virgo.
If In the 35th year of life (remainder 11), counting from Venus located in Capricorn., then The year is handed over to the Moon located in Scorpio.
If The number of benefic transmissions (paradosis) and malefic transmissions in a year are equal, then The year will be irregular and varied in its results

If Profections or releases from the Sun, Moon, or Ascendant fall into empty signs (signs without planets), then The lords of those signs become the givers of the transmission and determine the year's quality

If Malefic planets govern the year but the three primary releases (Sun, Moon, and Ascendant) have benefic power, then The year is active and distinguished, but accompanied by dispute, fear, and vexation

If No planet hands over a transmission and the division falls into empty places, then The timing of events, benefits, and dangers must be extracted from the Lot of Fortune, Lot of Daemon, Lot of Eros, and Lot of Necessity
If A profection or transmission reaches the four angles (kentra), then These points are highly significant for determining the year's quality and must be compared with the natal planet's nature

If In the 35th year, transmissions occur from the Ascendant and Mars to Saturn in Cancer, from the Moon to Mars, and from Venus to the Moon, then Each planet will manifest its inherent power (good or bad) according to its natal strength during this period
If The four angles (kentras) are active in a nativity, then They signify the years and determine the nature of the angles and their rulers
If A tropical sign is rising at the time of the rising of Sirius (the Dog Star), then The lord of the rising of Sirius is the general lord of the year
If Eclipses occur in profitable houses of the nativity, then Indicates eminent, leading, or royal births and significant changes in action or glory
If Eclipses occur in unprofitable houses of the nativity, then Indicates a humble or easily destroyed fortune
If Predicting life, bodily actions, or matters of the soul, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Ascendant (Horoskopos)
If Predicting glory, precedence, imagination, the father, or superior persons, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Sun
If Predicting bodily dangers, passions, bloodshed, or the mother, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Moon
If Predicting action (praxis), livelihood, and the soul, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Midheaven (MC)
If Predicting good fortune and the acquisition of livelihood, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Lot of Fortune
If Predicting death, change, or troubles, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Descendant (Dysis)
If Predicting foundations, possessions, hidden things, or matters of the dead, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the IC (Hypogeion)
If Predicting women, intercourse, or female matters, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from Venus
If Predicting military service or public affairs, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from Mars
If Predicting restoration of affairs, possessions, hidden passions, or paternal inheritance, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from Saturn
If Handover or reception from the Ascendant (Horoskopos), then Predicts matters concerning life and the body
If Handover or reception from the Midheaven (Mesouranema), then Predicts matters concerning action and advancement
If Handover or reception from the Descendant (Dysis), then Predicts matters concerning deaths, changes, or troubles
If Handover or reception from the IC (Hypogeion), then Predicts matters concerning dignities, possessions, secrets, or the dead
If Handover or reception from Venus, then Predicts matters concerning women, unions, associations, or feminine things
If Handover or reception from Mars, then Predicts matters concerning military service or public affairs
If Handover or reception from Saturn, then Predicts matters concerning the undoing of things, possessions, hidden sufferings, or paternal inheritance
If Handover or reception from Jupiter, then Predicts matters concerning glory, friendship, constitution, and acquisition
If Handover or reception from Mercury, then Predicts matters concerning partnership, slaves, bodily matters, giving and receiving, or writings
If Handover from an angular house to another angular house, then The predicted result will be effective and glorious
If Handover from the 11th house (Good Spirit) to the Lot of Fortune or a profitable place, then The predicted result will be effective and glorious
If Handover from cadent houses to angular houses, then The predicted result will be effective and glorious
If Handover from the 12th house (Bad Spirit) to the 11th house (Good Spirit), then The predicted result will be effective and glorious
If The 6th house (Bad Fortune) in relation to the Midheaven, then The 6th house is considered better than the 12th house because it forms a trine aspect to the Midheaven
If Saturn and Jupiter are universal time-lords (chronocrators) and are well-placed in the nativity, then The native will receive an inheritance or benefit from the deceased

If Saturn and Jupiter rule the year in the second or third twelve-year cycle but are not universal time-lords, then The native will not be a full heir, but will receive a legacy, benefit from the dead, or purchase real estate and foundations
If The configuration of the stars in the solar return or transits matches the configuration found in the natal chart, then The predicted result is certain and firm
If The configuration of the stars in the solar return or transits is foreign or dissimilar to the natal chart, then The predicted result will not be complete or fully realized
If A time-lord cycle recurs at an age appropriate for marriage, then Marriage, cohabitation, or matters and anxieties concerning women
If A time-lord period previously associated with military service recurs, then Advancement, change, or military action
If The universal time-lord indicates advancement and benefics are in control of the period, then Great advancement and promotion
If A high-ranking nativity (great birth) coincides with a period of advancement, then The native will attain leadership, governorship, or a position of authority
If The general foundation of the chart is progressive and benefics are in control during the time-lord periods, then The native will experience great progress during those times
If The birth is of a great and high rank, then The native will attain leadership, governorship, or authoritative rank
If A time-lord transmission that previously produced a child recurs when the native is at a fertile age, then The native will have children again
If A time-lord transmission that previously produced a child recurs, then The native will purchase slaves or take care of/raise children (their own or others')
If A time-lord transmission associated with previous leadership recurs and the natal foundation is strong, then The native will receive great and distinguished commands or offices
If A time-lord transmission associated with previous leadership recurs but the natal foundation is moderate, then The native will live among leaders or have the illusion/appearance of command
If A time-lord transmission associated with previous imprisonment or detention recurs while benefics testify to the period, then The native will be released from detention or cleared of charges

If A time-lord transmission associated with previous imprisonment or detention recurs while malefics testify to the period, then The native will remain under charge due to a more wicked deed, face hateful accusations, or die

If Transiting planets ingress upon the planets handing over or receiving the time-lordship, then The transits bring about good or bad results, making the outcome more active or causing hindrances based on their nature

If A transit forms a harmonious aspect to the planet handing over the period, or the handing/receiving planets share their natal aspect, then The predicted result of the period is confirmed and certain
If A planet is setting (under the beams) during the transmission or reception of a time-lord period, then The planet becomes inactive and acts as a source of hindrance
If A benefic planet is setting (under the beams) during the transmission of a period, then The planet provides only the appearance or illusion of benefit
If The Sun, Moon, and Ascendant signify dissimilar or conflicting outcomes for the year, then The year will be varied, inconsistent, or unstable in its results
If Saturn or Mars are in the 1st house (Horoskopos) during a hand-over (paradosis) or take-over (paralepsis) of a time-lord period, then The year will bring bodily distress, danger, or bloodshed

If Saturn or Mars are in the 2nd house from the Horoskopos during a hand-over or take-over of a time-lord period, then Disturbance because of a woman, danger to a woman, or troublesome causes through marriage
If Saturn or Mars are in the 3rd house from the Horoskopos during a hand-over or take-over of a time-lord period, then Unsafe travel, distress in foreign lands, or betrayal by foreigners
If Saturn or Mars are in the 12th house from the Horoskopos during a hand-over or take-over of a time-lord period, then Grief caused by slaves or enemies
If Saturn or Mars on the Ascendant making a transmission or reception, then Bodily distress, danger, or bloodshed in that year
If Saturn or Mars in the 7th house from the Ascendant making a transmission or reception, then Disturbance because of a woman, danger to a woman, or troubles through marriage
If Saturn or Mars in the 9th house from the Ascendant making a transmission or reception, then Unsafe travel, distress while abroad, or betrayal by foreigners
If Saturn or Mars in the 12th house from the Ascendant making a transmission or reception, then Grief because of slaves or uprisings of enemies
If Benefics (Jupiter or Venus) in the 1st, 7th, 9th, or 12th houses making a transmission or reception, then Reputation, benefits, desirable purchases, or successful travel
If Transmission or reception occurring in the 2nd or 8th houses (the idle and death-bringing places), then Benefit from death-related matters or inheritances, especially if benefics witness
If Malefics in the 2nd or 8th houses making a transmission or reception, then Disputes and controversies regarding legacies; the year is dangerous and full of grief
If Venus present or witnessing a malefic transmission, then Troubles due to poisoning/drugs or being slandered as plotters
If Saturn making a transmission to Jupiter, then Inheritances and benefits from the dead
If Transmission from Saturn to the house of Jupiter while in the Gates of Hades (2nd or 8th house), then Inheritance is certain
If Saturn and Jupiter in the same sign making a transmission or reception, then Inheritance, gift, or a beneficial occasion
If Saturn and Jupiter are in the same sign and make a transmission or reception, then Inheritance, gift, or a good occasion, especially if occurring from the Good Daemon or Good Fortune
If Transmission occurs when benefics are present, then Inheritances, gifts, or some good pretext
If Deadly places make a transmission to cadent houses or cadent houses to deadly places, then Hearing of the death of someone abroad or death in a foreign land
If Gemini and Sagittarius in any nativity, then They signify the place concerning slaves and servants
If Malefics are found in Gemini or Sagittarius, then Disturbances and injustices from slaves, as well as losses, deaths, and runaways
If Saturn is located in Gemini or Sagittarius, then Disturbances, injustices, losses, and deaths caused by slaves
If Benefics are present in Gemini or Sagittarius, then Goodwill and benefits received from slaves or servants
If Transmission occurs from one exaltation to another exaltation with benefics present or witnessing, then Glorious and beneficial results
If Transmission from own house to exaltation or from exaltation to own house with the lords present, then More effective and glorious results
If Transmission from depression to depression, then Moderate and irregular or unstable results
If Saturn or Mars are appropriately configured and transmit or receive from their own houses, exaltations, or operative places, then Great benefits and glory
If Saturn is well-configured during transmission, then Inheritances, landed property, foundations, management of produce, and success in old matters
If Mars is well-configured during transmission, then Leadership and command
If Benefics, Sun, and Moon are appropriately configured to Saturn or Mars during their transmission, then Great manifestations and useful results
If Benefics are absent, Luminaries are in opposition or ill-configured, and Mercury is involved, then Accusations, oppositions, great dangers, plots, disturbances, and depositions
If Transmission or reception occurs in alien exaltations or places ill-configured, then Falls from heights or four-footed animals, injuries, bloodshed, or dangerous diseases
If Malefic planets in handovers (paradosis) or transits (epembasis), then Accusations, oppositions, great dangers, plots, disturbances, and depositions
If Planets in alien dignities or inappropriate handovers, then Falls from heights, injuries from four-footed animals, bloodshed, dangerous diseases, fires, or shipwrecks
If Planets of the sect (diurnal or nocturnal) in their own handovers or transits, then Great goods and benefits; they become causes of great success

If Jupiter or Venus in handovers or transits found in opposition, inappropriately placed, or fallen, then Disturbed times, difficult to manage, delays, loss of expected hopes or utilities, mental distress, and business distress
If Stars found oriental (rising) during handovers or transits to the horoscopic places, then Manifest actions clearly; the power is awakened and produces results according to its nature
If Planets at the first station (stationary retrograde), then Delays in expected things, business, utilities, and advancements
If Planets at the acronychal phase (opposition to the Sun), then Weaker and obstructive, showing only fantasies and hopes without substance
If Planets at the second station (stationary direct), then Dissolves delays, restores actions to stability, and leads to success in life
If Planets under the rays (combust), then Obstacles, losses in business, bodily dangers, diseases, and pains in hidden places
If A planet makes its second station, then Dissolves delays, restores actions to their previous state, and leads to stability and the correction of life.
If A planet is under the influence of two [malefics or stations], then Brings interruptions and losses in affairs, bodily dangers, diseases, and pains in hidden places.
If A malefic planet responsible for evil in the nativity is transited or profected upon by a malefic planet during the year, then The intensification and increase of the predicted evil.
If A malefic planet responsible for evil in the nativity is transited or profected upon by a benefic planet during the year, then Provides a certain consolation and assistance against the evil.
If Jupiter transits or profects to the year-lord, or to its square or opposition, while the general times are good or in profitable houses, then Produces great benefits and glory.
If Jupiter transits or profects to the year-lord while the general times are bad, then Jupiter becomes weaker; benefits and glory are postponed or suspended.
If Jupiter is oriental (rising before the Sun), then Provides moderate consolation and relief.
If A benefic planet is in the 3rd or 9th house from the Ascendant, then Results in beneficial travel, success in foreign lands, or business and associations with foreigners.
If The 3rd or 9th house from the Ascendant is in a bicorporeal sign, then The native will benefit many times or travel abroad frequently.
If Benefics are in the 3rd or 9th house and the general times are supportive, then The native receives oracles, foreknows the future, or builds temples and religious offerings.
If The natal foundation is great and general times support the 3rd or 9th house, then The native receives gifts from kings, high commands, or positions of authority.
If Malefics are in or aspecting the 3rd or 9th house from the Ascendant, then The native is mistreated abroad, suffers losses or poverty, and encounters dangers and failures in foreign travel.
If Malefics occupy the 3rd or 9th house, then The native may deny the divine, become heterodox, eat forbidden foods, or be regarded as mad or a religious fanatic.

If Time-lords are in foreign places or high places (exaltations) but afflicted, then The native falls into want, experiences wanderings and dangers, and blames their own fate as if suffering divine wrath
If Malefic time-lord periods for individuals of high status and glory, then Disturbances from abroad or foreigners, public outcries, and uprisings of crowds or cities
If Malefic time-lord periods involving accusations and royal fears, then Loss of property and danger to life

If A distinguished nativity with benefic testimony where malefics take over time-periods or transit the angles or the 10th house, then The native manages affairs in a disorderly way and experiences public outcries, fears, and disturbances, though not total ruin
If The Sun or the Full Moon is afflicted by malefics during time-lord handovers, then The native commits illegal or violent acts, endures public dangers, and faces uprisings of enemies
If The Moon or the Ascendant is afflicted by malefics, then Bodily distress, dangerous diseases, and a painful or uneven reputation
If Specific malefic time-lord periods affecting religious disposition, then The native may deny the divine, worship heterodoxically, or eat forbidden foods
If Specific malefic time-lord periods affecting mental state, then The native becomes involved in prophecy, oracles, or divination, or is perceived as being mad
If The Moon or the Ascendant is afflicted, then Bodily distress, dangerous diseases, or the glory of authority becomes painful and distressing for the native

If The general nativity is inactive or private (aprakton) and the universal predisposition is weak, then Transits and profections do not produce extraordinary changes, innovations, or significant shifts in fortune
If Malefics transit the places of a very fortunate nativity, then They do not cause significant harm because the universal predisposition cannot be easily altered by specific transits
If Benefics transit a mediocre nativity, then They do not provide significant help due to the universal predisposition of the chart
If The nativity is of high status (exalted) and benefics hold the time-periods, then Brilliant manifestations, benefits, and significant progress occur
If The nativity is of high status (exalted) and malefics hold the time-periods, then Elevations occur alongside disturbances and bodily annoyances, but the underlying status remains indestructible
If The nativity is of low status and benefics take the annual periods, then Benefics become weaker in their ability to do good and yield to malefics, allowing harm to the nativity
If The actions (praxeis) of the nativity are governed by the Sun, Moon, or Jupiter, then The status and foundation of the life is found to be glorious and distinguished
If The ruler of the native's occupation is well-aspected or transiting a significant place, then The year will be beneficial and reputable regarding the native's work and activities
If Saturn transits the places of the Sun or the Moon, then Harm and damage occur regarding the specific significations of the Sun, Moon, or the houses they occupy
If Planets (including Sun and Moon) are in the scholastic place and act as time-lords, then They become more active and effective in their influence
If Planets are in opposition to one another, then They become disturbing and cause trouble
If The annual profection from the Sun, Moon, or Ascendant indicates a result, then The predicted outcome (good or bad) is unchangeable and certain to manifest
If The Sun, Moon, or other planets are in the operative (scholastic) place and acting as time-lords, then They become more effective and active; if they are in opposition, they cause disturbance
If The annual profection from the Sun, Moon, or Ascendant indicates a specific outcome, then The result will be unchangeable, whether good or bad
If The annual profection falls to Venus, Jupiter, or into profitable houses, then The year will be good and beneficial
If The annual profection falls to Saturn, Mars, or into afflicted houses, then The year will be bad or harmful
If The three profectional indicators (Sun, Moon, Ascendant) signify different or dissimilar outcomes, then The year will be varied, inconsistent, and uneven
If Malefic planets hand over time-lordship to benefic planets, then This is a better and more favorable transition than benefics handing over to malefics
If A planet hands over to its own domicile lord located in a profitable house, then The period of time will be productive and effective
If Benefic planets are present in or aspecting the profectional sign, or the sign itself is profitable, then Success, benefit, and the fulfillment of desires
If The lord of a place is poorly situated, but its own dispositor (lord of the lord) is well situated, then Mitigation of evil, partial benefit, and the successful realization of expectations
If The universal time-lords are the Sun, Moon, or benefics, and the sub-division is well-placed, then The native receives trusts or gifts from superior or royal persons
If Jupiter overcomes Saturn, or is in square, trine, opposition, or conjunction with Saturn, then The native receives greater and more beneficial gifts
If Mars is in trine or square to Jupiter, or Mars is in the setting region while Jupiter is in the IC, then The native receives greater and more beneficial gifts
If Mercury is not aspected by Saturn or Mars, but is aspected by Jupiter and Venus, then The native will be ambitious, enjoy a great reputation, and receive honor
If Mercury is aspected or observed by Mars, then The native will experience regret, blame, disturbance, and a notorious or scandalous reputation
If Mars and Mercury are configured together and witnessed by Jupiter and Venus, then The native will be a lover of glory and share in great fame and honor
If Mars and Mercury are configured together but overseen or overcome by Mars, then The native experiences repentance, blame, disturbance, and notorious reputation
If Mars and Mercury are configured together and witnessed by Saturn, then The native will live in constraints, face accusations, or be in dangerous situations
If Mars and Mercury are configured together and witnessed by both benefics and Saturn/Mars, then Both positive (honor) and negative (danger/blame) outcomes will occur
If A handover (transmission) occurs in Taurus or Virgo, then The results are unstable, delayed, or subject to litigation
If A handover (transmission) occurs in Sagittarius or Capricorn, then The results are enigmatic and harmful because these signs are incomplete/maimed

If Saturn and Mars are in opposition to or overcoming (superior square) the Sun, Moon, or Ascendant in a child's birth, then The predicted maltreatment or effects fall upon the parents or the master until the native reaches their prime

If Benefit is expected from a death or inheritance, then The result will manifest during the time periods (chronocrators) of the person expecting the inheritance, rather than the exact time of the death
If General prediction of results or outcomes in a nativity, then The result or completion of the matter will be produced from the Midheaven (MC)

If Matters concerning glory, gifts, commerce, partnerships, marriage, or travel, then The timing of the outcome is subject to the sympathies or oppositions of the nativities and the specific time-lords involved
If The Sun reaches the tropical degrees (solstices or equinoxes), then Atmospheric changes occur, leading to either temperate weather or severe storms and fearful winds
If The Moon reaches its phases or conjunctions (syzygies), then It contributes to rainfall or stirs the air, potentially causing unexpected seasonal confusion or calm
If The risings and settings of the planets occur, then The manifestation of their effects may occur earlier or later than the exact astronomical event due to the nature of the cycle
If Annual risings, conjunctions, full moons, or eclipses occur, then These events, along with the lords of the cycles, determine the general changes and the quality of the time periods

If Sun handing over to Saturn (chronocratorship/profection), then A bad year; signifies inactivity, obstacles, enmities, disputes, oppression from superiors or elders, uprisings, diseases, eye problems, life instability, death of the father or father-figure, accusations, and imprisonments.

If Sun handing over to Jupiter (chronocratorship/profection), then A bright year; glory for the father, associations with superiors, prosperity, gifts, notable actions, high offices, birth of children, marriage for the unmarried, success in business, and good hopes.

If Sun handing over to Mars (chronocratorship/profection), then A sickly and precarious year; danger to the father, disturbances in actions, success only after much trial, expenses, untimely losses, enmity from superiors, injuries, bloodshed, pain in vital organs, and envious accusations.

If Sun handing over to Venus (chronocratorship/profection), then A good and friendly time; associations, friendships, gifts, pleasures, marriage, birth of children, purchase of ornaments or slaves, high office and glory for those in power, and release from accusations.
If Sun handing over to Mercury (chronocratorship/profection), then Practical, profitable, and social; beneficial to subordinates, successful in giving and receiving.
If Sun handing over to Mercury while aspected by malefics, then Lawsuits, disturbances, fears regarding money or documents, condemnation of subordinates or friends, untimely expenses, and losses.

If Sun handing over to the Moon (chronocratorship/profection), then Practical and philanthropic; acquisitions, benefits from males and females, associations, marriages, notable offspring, prosperity from travel or foreign lands, and gifts.
If Sun handing over to itself (Sun to Sun) and well-aspected, then Bright indications and notable actions.
If Sun distributing to itself (Sun/Sun period) and well-configured in the nativity, then Bright reputations, advancements with superiors, greater associations, and unexpected benefits
If Sun distributing to itself (Sun/Sun period) with benefics or aspected by them, then Greater glory and increased benefits
If Sun distributing to itself (Sun/Sun period) in a nocturnal birth, then Less effective results, or disturbances causing enmities, trials, and envious accusations

If Sun distributing to itself (Sun/Sun period) with malefic conjunction or aspect, then Reduction of livelihood, loss of reputation, dangerous travels, enmity with the father, and business disturbances
If Moon distributing to itself (Moon/Moon period), then Enmities and lawsuits from superior persons, and disputes involving relatives or a wife
If Moon distributing to itself (Moon/Moon period) aspected by a malefic, then Bodily weaknesses and sudden dangers
If Moon distributing to itself (Moon/Moon period) aspected by a benefic, then Release from troubles, travel or change of place, success in affairs, and healing of ills
If Moon distributing to the Sun (Moon/Sun period) aspected by malefics, then Movement in life, high expenses, interruptions in activities, empty hopes, strife, and instability with servants or women
If Moon distributing to the Sun (Moon/Sun period) for those in stable or high-status positions, then Expenses directed toward purchases, success in affairs, advancement, gifts, and benefits

If Moon distributing to Saturn (Moon/Saturn period) while the Moon is waning or lacking light, then Illness or death of the mother, enmities, instability of affairs, changes of place, chilling of activities, bodily dangers, and sensory pains
If Moon distributing to Saturn (Moon/Saturn period) while the Moon is oriental or rising, then The evil is lessened, though the period remains harmful and painful

If Moon handing over to Saturn, then A varied and unstable year; weakness or death of the mother; enmities, instability of affairs, changes in labor, cooling of actions, bodily dangers, and pains in hidden parts or sense organs.
If Moon handing over to Saturn while waning, then Increased severity of pains in hidden parts or sense organs.
If Moon handing over to Saturn while rising, then The evil is less severe, though the time remains harmful and painful.

If Moon handing over to Jupiter, then A good and practical time; acquisition and increase of livelihood; reputation and offices derived from female benefits; marriage for the unmarried; children for the married; increase in mother's life or reputation; success in affairs and fulfillment of hopes.

If Moon handing over to Mars, then A difficult year; dangers, illnesses, bloodletting, falls, fire, loss, instability of the household, deaths of females or separations, enmities, trials, and uprisings of crowds.
If Moon handing over to Mars while rising by day, then Especially dangerous; brings illnesses, bloodletting, and falls.
If Moon handing over to Mars while waning or under the influence of both malefics at night, then Failure in attempts, accompanied by fears and toils.
If Moon handing over to Venus, then A successful and effective time; reputation and increases from both males and females; sympathies and marriages.
If Moon handing over to Venus in disharmony or beheld by malefics, then Unpleasantness, envy, expenses on female persons, and rejections; jealousy, strife, and enmity toward relatives or friends.
If Moon handing over to Mercury, then Practical and successful regarding female persons and increases, especially if configured with benefics.
If Moon handing over to Mercury with malefics, then Lawsuits and disturbances regarding money, writings, or accounts; great struggle.
If Moon handing over to Mercury when Mercury is well-placed, then The native will prevail in their struggles.
If Moon handing over to Mercury when Mercury is ill-placed, then The native will be condemned and suffer many expenditures.
If Ascendant handing over to a malefic, especially Saturn at night or Mars by day, then The worst time; bodily dangers, irregularities of life, problematic marriages, accusations, falls, or injuries.
If Ascendant handing over to Jupiter, then A bright and comprehensive time; reputation and worthy ranks; benefit and promotion from superiors; release from dangers or accusations; freedom.

If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) is handed over to a malefic planet, then The time is very bad, especially if Saturn rules by night or Mars by day; it brings bodily and livelihood irregularities, and troubles regarding marriage or accusations.

If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) is handed over to Jupiter, then The time is bright and acquisitive, indicating glory, high ranks, benefit from superiors, release from dangers or accusations, and freedom.
If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) is handed over to Venus, then The time is good and charming, indicating associations, female connections, purchases, joy, and release from evils.
If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) is handed over to the Sun, then The year is acquisitive and sympathetic to greater/superior things; for those in office, it brings higher ranks and progress.
If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) is handed over to the Moon, then The time is practical and unchanging, bringing benefit from females, associations, innovations, and successful foreign travel.
If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) is handed over to the Moon while malefics witness (aspect), then The results are the opposite of the positive Moon rule, bringing disturbances.
If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) is handed over to Mercury, then The time is practical, profitable, and successful.
If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) is handed over to Mercury while harmed by malefics, then The native becomes subject to lawsuits and anxiety.
If Saturn distributes to itself (Saturn period/sub-period), then Signifies disturbances, inactivity, enmity from superiors or elders, dishonor, and hindered or unstable efforts.
If Saturn distributes to itself while aspected by Mercury and Mars, then Brings accusations regarding writings, trials, revival of old matters or capital cases, malice, and deceit.
If Saturn distributes to the Sun, then Danger or death to the father (if the Sun is weak), a burdensome year, enmity, dishonor, trials, physical suffering, and small-mindedness with friends.
If Saturn distributes to the Sun while well-aspected or favorably placed, then The native will benefit after delays and expenditures, or benefit from a death (inheritance).

If Saturn distributes to the Moon, then Danger to the mother, enmity with female persons, losses through women, business disturbances, bodily weakness, chronic diseases, internal pains, and vision issues.
If Saturn distributes to Mars, then A very bad and dangerous year; brings weaknesses, plots, personal disturbances, deaths, trials, ingratitude of friends, and fear of superiors.

If Saturn and Mars in configuration, then Harm, mischief, disturbance of affairs, bloody movements, bodily weaknesses, chronic sufferings, internal disturbances, loss of senses, fainting, dizziness, and unexpected sufferings.

If Saturn and Jupiter in configuration, then Very bad and dangerous; weaknesses, plots, disturbances, dangers, deaths of relatives, disturbances concerning property, trials, ingratitude of friends, instability of household, disputes, fears of superiors, long enmities, death to the native or elders, and dangerous or unsuccessful travels.
If Saturn and Jupiter in profitable signs or witnessed by benefics, then Most of the causes of trouble will be dispersed.
If Saturn and Jupiter in a positive configuration, then Good and practical time; receive inheritances or bequests, benefit from elders or the dead, and gain mastery over foundations or properties.

If Saturn and Jupiter in configuration (maritime/business context), then Gain from liquids or shipping or buying ships, rebuilding or pulling down structures, success in old matters, and a well-ordered life.
If Saturn and Jupiter witnessed by Mars or Mercury, then Undergo trials or lawsuits and make untimely expenditures.
If Saturn and Venus in configuration, then Separation from women, being wronged by females, deaths of associates, and instability in cohabitation and sexual relations.

If Saturn and Venus in configuration (health and social), then Plotted against, experience of phantoms/apparitions, internal disturbances, illnesses, chills, fluxes of humors, oppositions, trials, and innovations in actions.
If Saturn and Venus in a woman's nativity, especially if pregnant, then Painful life and instability with male friends.

If Saturn and Mercury in configuration, then Disputes over old matters or secrets, money or rumors, interruptions and losses in business, betrayals and enmities, deaths of relatives, meddlesome behavior, and trouble with loans or writings.
If Saturn square or opposite Mercury, then Very bad and destructive; brings fears and disturbances through matters of the dead.
If Jupiter in its own period/sub-period, then Good and practical time, benefits from friends and gifts.

If Jupiter distributing to itself (Jupiter/Jupiter period), then A good and practical time; benefits from friends and gifts; success in affairs; trust, management, and associations with superiors; and the procreation of children.
If Jupiter distributing to itself while aspected by Mars, then Irregularity and untimely expenses.

If Jupiter distributing to the Sun, then A brilliant and acquisitive time; favor from superiors; advancement, honors, and leadership; military command or authority according to the rank of the person.

If Jupiter distributing to the Sun for those of moderate means, then Release from evils and freedom; beneficial associations; changes and friendships; children and physical health, especially if well-configured by day.

If Jupiter distributing to Saturn, then Unstable movements and expenses; disobedience from family; deaths and changes in places or affairs; unstable partnerships and enmity with friends; difficulty in accomplishing tasks or success only after delay.

If Jupiter distributing to Mars, then A harmful and turbulent year; enmities with superiors; slander, betrayals, and dangerous foreign travel; diseases and deaths of relatives; irregularities in life and expenses.

If Jupiter distributing to Mars in a public or military birth with good configuration, then Associations and advancement through expenses; gifts and promises, though often accompanied by fear or suspicion.
If Jupiter distributing to Venus, then A friendly and acquisitive time; charm and associations; gifts and benefits from or through women; marriage for the unmarried and children for the married.

If Jupiter distributing to Venus in distinguished births, then Distinguished ranks and political offices; gifts from the public; better advancement and protection; acquisition of property and ornaments.

If Jupiter distributing to Mercury, then Profitable involvement in affairs; success through words, numbers, or writings; great associations and friendships; gifts and benefits from deposits or findings; purchase of slaves.
If Jupiter and Mercury in square or opposition during a distribution, then Very bad and destructive results; deaths, fears, and disturbances.
If Jupiter and Mercury in aspect or conjunction, then Practical success, gainful business dealings, and success through speech, logic, or writing.
If Jupiter and Mercury in aspect or conjunction, then Associations and friendships with superiors, benefits from deposits or findings, purchase of slaves, and a love of beauty.
If Jupiter and Mercury poorly placed or aspected by malefics (square or opposition), then Slander among crowds, disturbances, notoriety, great struggles, and living in fear.
If Jupiter and Moon in aspect or conjunction, then Easy achievement, acquisition, associations with women or powerful persons, glory, leadership, and escape from danger.
If Jupiter and Moon in aspect or conjunction, then Acquisition of ornaments or slaves, procreation, and benefits from the mother.
If Jupiter and Moon well placed, then Mastery over deposits, finding treasures, being pleasing to God, and release from debt or slavery.
If Mars distributing to itself by day, then Enmities, injuries, public business troubles, and harassment by military or powerful persons.
If Mars distributing to itself by night, then Success and benefits, especially in active signs or for those in military or public service.
If Mars handing over to the Sun, then Danger to the father, enmities with superiors, separation from friends, dangerous diseases, and pain in sense organs.
If Mars handing over to the Sun, then Danger from fire, sword, or animals; hemorrhages, cuts, falls, envy, and dangerous travels.
If Mars handing over to the Sun in productive signs or witnessed by benefics, then Actions, benefits, and glory, though accompanied by fear, turmoil, and plots.
If Mars handing over to the Moon, then Instability, lawsuits, fears, dangerous travels, and attacks from others.
If Mars handing over to the Moon, then Danger to the mother, fights or separations with women, disturbances with crowds, hemorrhages, and falls.

If Mars as the lord of the year or in a specific period, then A difficult and dangerous year of instability, trials, fears, and dangers from foreigners or attacks; causes fights with female persons, separations, and public disturbances.
If Mars as lord of the year causing physical ailments, then Brings diseases, hemorrhages, falls from heights, danger from fire, and shipwrecks.
If Mars as lord of the year in a day birth with the Moon decreasing and poorly placed, then The predicted evils are worsened, including injuries, blindness or eye pain, and severe distress.
If Mars witnessed by benefics in operative places, then Brings fearful actions that nonetheless lead to progress and success.
If Mars in relation to female matters, then Brings bodily dangers, hemorrhages, destruction, miscarriages, and pains in the natural parts.
If Mars handing over to Saturn, then Indicates a very bad and turbulent year; results in trials, insults, losses, rejections, personal dangers, violent deaths, and involvement in dangerous affairs.
If Mars handing over to Saturn (travel and social context), then Harmful travels, robberies, diseases, sudden dangers, uprisings of enemies, and wrongs or grief caused by slaves.
If Mars handing over to Saturn while in their own dignities or witnessed by benefics, then The native escapes the causes of the predicted evils.
If Mars handing over to Jupiter, then Indicates a good and practical year; brings successes, benefits from superiors, associations, good hopes, and fulfillment of expectations.
If Mars handing over to Jupiter for those in high status, then Brings military advancement, fame, leadership, and a change of place for the better, though preceded by some irregularity.
If Mars in opposition to Jupiter, then Indicates conflicts and losses.
If Mars handing over to Venus, then Indicates enmities and separations from female persons, instability of relatives, and the death of the mother.
If Mars handing over to Venus (social and health context), then Brings adultery, unstable friendships, and for women, hemorrhages or miscarriages.
If Mars handing over to Mercury, then Indicates a turbulent year; brings dangers and losses regarding documents, silver, or business; causes disputes, malice, and debts.
If Mars handing over to Mercury, then A turbulent year; dangers and losses due to writings, money, or silver; disputes over work; involvement in crimes, guarantees, or debts; lawsuits and defenses.
If Mars and Mercury located in a dishonorable or unmarked place (asemos), then The native will commit fraud or villainy, or exhibit the same negative traits to others.
If Mars and Mercury with the three releasing points (apheses) well-preserved, then The native will overcome the previously mentioned evils.
If Mars and Mercury with the releasing points (apheses) badly placed, then Instability in business; defeat in trials; suffering under heavy and unusual accusations.
If Venus distributing to herself while well-placed, then Friendships, associations with men and women, sympathies, gifts, pleasant habits, marriages, goodwill of relatives, pleasures, and benefits.

If Venus distributing to herself while with Saturn or Mars, or aspected by them, or in unconfigured signs, then Reproaches, scandals, adulteries, losses, repudiations, deceits of women, trials, and instabilities; similarly for women from men.
If Venus handing over to the Sun, then Reputation and acquisition; associations with male and female persons; beneficial habits, marriages, childbearing, purchases, gifts of jewelry and slaves.
If Venus handing over to the Sun while well-aspected, then Reputation for the father; sympathy and benefits from high-status people.

If Venus handing over to the Sun for those in high positions, then Wearing of crowns (honors), priesthoods, promotions, commands, gifts from crowds, profits, knowledge of secret or divine matters, sexual pleasures, and joy.
If Venus handing over to the Moon while well-placed and in opportune places, then A period of acquisition and benefit; an elegant life; notable reputation.
If Venus handing over to the Moon (general), then Accompanied by jealousy, rivalry, strife, and secret envies.

If Venus handing over to the Moon while badly aspected, then Incomplete or partial acquisitions; injustice and enmity from male and female persons; separations and instability regarding relatives and friends.
If Venus handing over to Saturn, then A precarious and harmful time; separations from women, battles, insults, scandals, and injustices.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Saturn, then Unstable and harmful time; causes separations from women, insults, and displays of injustice.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Saturn, then Enmity from the mother or female relatives; disputes with elders or business partners; unstable friendships.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Saturn, then Physical weakness, pains in the hidden parts or sense organs, and plots involving drugs or chronic diseases.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Jupiter, then A good and acquisitive year; brings promotions from great persons, gifts, and political or military honors.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Jupiter, then Marriages, advice from female persons, friendships, procreation, and success in undertakings.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Jupiter if the native is of high status, then Release from subordination, attainment of trust and honor, and improvement of the soul's condition.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Mars, then An unstable year; causes fights with women, corruption of females, or the death of the mother.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Mars, then Lawsuits due to women, jealousy, adultery, and being betrayed or wronged against one's will.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Mercury, then A practical and successful time; brings gains through trade, education, and the acquisition of ornaments.
If Venus in the period or distribution of Mercury, then Unions of males and females, honors, success in business, and sympathy from relatives.
If Mercury in its own period or distribution, then Practical and beneficial results; success in undertakings, trusts, and overcoming enemies through cleverness.
If Mercury in its own period, being oriental, in profitable houses, or aspected by Jupiter and Venus, then Greater success and prosperity through words, calculations, or secret matters.

If Mercury as time-lord (self-distribution), then The native becomes practical and helpful in enterprises, overcomes enemies through secrecy or acting, succeeds in business, and gains prosperity from words or calculations.
If Mercury oriental or in busy places, aspected by Jupiter and Venus, then Indicates greater trust and beneficial outcomes in affairs.
If Mercury aspected by malefic planets, then Brings fears and oppositions to the native.
If Mercury handing over the year to the Sun, then The year is social and practical, bringing introductions to superiors, gifts, management roles, and reputation through education or speech.
If Mercury handing over the year to the Moon, well-aspected and oriental, then A practical year involving introductions to men and women, benefits in business, success, and trust in one's dealings.
If Mercury handing over the year to the Moon, poorly placed or aspected by malefics, then Brings legal judgments, expenses, threats from superiors, fears, and betrayals of secrets.
If Mercury handing over the year to Saturn, then A disturbed and dangerous year; causes reversals of affairs, losses, and legal judgments regarding secrets, writings, or debts.
If Mercury handing over the year to Saturn (health context), then Brings physical weakness, wasting diseases, trials of drugs, and deaths of relatives, siblings, or children.
If Mercury and Saturn in opposition or square, or poorly aspected by Mars, then Brings danger, shipwrecks, falls, and false testimony.
If Mercury handing over the year to Jupiter, then The native is practical and successful, gaining friendships, success in business, management roles, and prosperity through words or calculations.
If Mercury handing over the year to Jupiter (afflicted context), then Causes disturbances in crowds, fears, untimely expenses, and instability with relatives or friends.
If Mercury handing over the year to Mars, then An unfavorable year; brings enmities, legal losses, crimes, false writings, dangerous guarantees, attacks, robberies, and betrayals.
If Mercury and Mars in aspect or conjunction, then Enmity, lawsuits, losses, and mischief; leads to forgery, false guarantees, sudden attacks, robberies, instability, and betrayal by relatives.

If Mercury and Venus in aspect or conjunction, then Practical and good for the times; success in giving and receiving, buying and selling, and beneficial exchanges; brings new friendships, associations, and sexual encounters.
If The Lot of Fortune in operative houses with benefics present or witnessing, then Good fortune, progress in actions, reputation, increase of affairs, success, and benefits from the dead.
If The Lot of Fortune in cadent houses or witnessed by malefics, then Lesser actions and reputation; instability in achievements; subject to obstacles, dangers, trials, and insults.
If The Lot of Spirit in operative houses with benefics present or witnessing, then Desirable choices, successful reasoning, helpful advice from friends, promotion, reputation, and high mental acuity.

If The Lot of Spirit in cadent houses or witnessed by malefics, then Mental distress, lack of perception, contradictory plans, and failure to achieve goals; the native may blame others for their own mistakes.

If The Lot of Eros in operative houses with benefics present or witnessing, then Desirable desires and love of beauty; the native turns toward education, physical training, music, and refined pleasures.

If The Lot of Love (Eros) handing over or receiving in busy places with benefics present or witnessing, then Creates well-intentioned desires and beautiful lovers; the native turns toward education, physical training, or music, and finds pleasure in hope.

If Mars and Mercury witnessing or present in the place of the Lot of Love, especially in their own signs, then Makes pederasts or those blamed for both sexes, or lovers of weapons, hunting, and wrestling.
If Venus witnessing or present in the place of the Lot of Love, then Leads to female companionship and associations.
If Malefics present or witnessing the Lot of Love, then The experience of desire results in torture, loss, and danger.

If Saturn with Venus and the Moon, or witnessing them, then The native is blamed for shameful and licentious deeds involving both males and females, suffers notoriety, or experiences reversals due to deep feelings.
If Jupiter witnessing the combination of Saturn, Venus, and the Moon, then The outcome of the desires becomes distinguished, powerful, or mystical.
If Mars and Mercury present, witnessing, or receiving the time (chronos), then Leads to criminal acts or piracy; the native becomes a forger, plunderer, burglar, or gambler with a corrupted mind.
If Venus witnessing Mars and Mercury, then The native becomes a poisoner, adulterer, or suicide; they live dangerously, entangled in debts, loans, and criminal trials.
If The Lot of Necessity (Ananke) handing over or receiving in busy places with benefics present or witnessing, then Brings new associations, friendships, and the removal or death of enemies.
If Malefics present with the Lot of Necessity, then Brings lawsuits, trials, and expenditures, often forcing the native to act against their will.
If Lot of Necessity is in operative (chrematistikois) places with benefics present or witnessing, then Brings associations, greater unions, and the destruction of enemies or deaths of rivals
If Lot of Necessity is in operative (chrematistikois) places with malefics present, then Brings lawsuits, trials, and expenditures; causes individuals to act against their will and live in distress
If The configuration of the Lot of Necessity is afflicted (kakothe), then Individuals are condemned or destroyed
If The lord of the degree (monomoiria) of the Moon is identified, then This planet takes the first period of years in the distribution of time, followed by the others in order
If During the day, the Sun is in a pivot (angle), then The beginning of the year is calculated from the Sun's position
If During the night, the Moon is in a pivot (angle), then The beginning of the year is calculated from the Moon's position
If The Sun and Moon are not in pivots (angles), then The beginning of the year is taken from the Ascendant (Horoskopos)
If The Lot of Fortune is in a pivot (angle) while the luminaries are not, then The beginning of the year is taken from the Lot of Fortune
If During the day, the Sun is poorly placed, then The beginning of the year is taken from the Moon
If During the night, the Moon is poorly placed, then The beginning of the year is taken from the Sun
If Both Sun and Moon are inarticulate (akyrologetoi), then The beginning of the year is taken from the domicile master (oikodespotes) or another well-placed planet
If The Lot of Fortune is angular and following the pivots (angles) of the chart, then The beginning of the astrological year is calculated from the position of the Lot of Fortune
If Day birth where the Sun is located in the Ascendant or the Midheaven, then The annual profection or year-lord calculation begins from the Sun
If Day birth where the Sun is not angular, the year is projected from the Ascendant, then The year is determined by the lord of the sign where the profection ends
If Night birth where the Moon is located in the Ascendant or the Midheaven, especially if increasing in number/light, then The annual profection or year-lord calculation begins from the Moon
If The signs of the year are angular or occupied/aspected by benefics, then The annual results and predictions for the year will be good and successful
If The signs of the year are in cadent or difficult places (the opposite of angular/benefic), then The annual results will be bad or contrary to expectations
If Stars are oriental (rising) and aspecting the relevant places, then They provide success and the ability to accomplish actions
If Stars are occidental (setting), then They cause failures, lack of success, or the cessation of activities
If The birth occurs during a New Moon (conjunction) or Full Moon (opposition), then The months of the year take their beginning and character from the sign in which the syzygy occurred
If The lord of the sign reached by counting days from the natal Moon (using the 5 1/4 multiplier method), then Determines the quality and nature of the specific day and its events
If The lord of the sign reached by the monthly profection count, then Determines the quality and nature of the specific month
If Counting two hours per sign starting from the sign of the day, then Identifies good and effective hours for the beginning of any undertaking
If The lord of the hour or sign is in aspect to the angles (Ascendant, Midheaven, etc.), then Indicates the strength and effectiveness of the hour; reveals weak or 'bed-ridden' (sickly) times
If A profection or direction (peripatos) concerning women, daughters, or feminine matters, then The prediction must be derived from Venus
If A profection or direction (peripatos) concerning business, actions, or trade, then The prediction must be derived from Mercury
If Malefics (Saturn or Mars) directed toward the Ascendant, Sun, or Moon, then Predicts dangers, death, diseases, or bloodshed
If The annual profection or direction of the Sun, then Indicates matters concerning the soul and the spirit
If The annual profection or direction of the Moon, then Indicates matters concerning the body and the mother
If The annual profection or direction of the Lot of Fortune, then Indicates general fortune and external circumstances
If The lords of the year (Sun, Moon, or Lot) are benefics and in harmonious configuration, then The year will be good and prosperous
If The lords of the year (Sun, Moon, or Lot) are malefics, then The year will be contrary, difficult, or harmful
If The Sun (Helios) is examined for the annual distribution of years, then It indicates matters pertaining to the soul and the spirit (psychic matters)
If The Moon (Selene) is examined for the annual distribution of years, then It indicates matters pertaining to the body and matters concerning the mother
If The Lot of Fortune (Kleros Tyches) is examined for the annual distribution of years, then It reveals the general fortune and circumstances of the year
If Benefic planets are in harmony and appear favorably in the annual distribution, then The year is predicted to be good and auspicious
If Malefic planets are dominant or in unfavorable configurations in the annual distribution, then The year is predicted to be difficult or the opposite of good
If Both benefic and malefic planets are mixed in the annual distribution, then The year will produce mixed results, both good and bad
If The division of time is calculated according to the quarters of the planetary cycles, then Determines the active (effective) and inactive periods of the native's life
If The year ends at a specific sign in the profection or distribution, then The lord of that sign is the first to distribute the time and influence for that period
If A planet is positioned within its specific bounds (terms) in the twelve signs, then The planet grants a number of years equal to the number of degrees it holds in those bounds
If Planets located within their respective terms (bounds) in the twelve signs, then The planet grants a number of years equal to the number of degrees of the term it occupies
If Ascendant is in Libra and the progression reaches Capricorn, then The first 50 units of time are given to Saturn, followed by Mercury
If Capricorn is viewed by a square radiation from Libra, then Capricorn is established as the house of Saturn and influenced by the square aspect
If Venus is the lord of the trine and is located in Cancer, then The chronocratorship or distribution ends in Libra

If Calculation of the Lot of Accusation (causative of fears and dangers) by day: distance from Saturn to Mars projected from the Ascendant, then Indicates the source of fears, dangers, and imprisonment

If Calculation of the Lot of Accusation (causative of fears and dangers) by night: distance from Mars to Saturn projected from the Ascendant, then Indicates the source of fears, dangers, and imprisonment
If Saturn is in Taurus and the progression ends in Leo, then In the sign of Libra, Saturn hands over the year to the Sun

If The Lot of Accusation (calculated by day from Saturn to Moon from the Ascendant, and by night from Mars to Saturn from the Ascendant) is occupied or aspected by malefic planets., then The birth is hazardous, dangerous, and liable to downfall or destruction.
If Benefic planets witness or aspect the Lot of Accusation., then The evil is lessened or a release from the causes of fear and danger is provided.
If The Sun or Moon is in sextile aspect to Saturn or Mars within 5 degrees, especially in hearing signs., then The birth is fearful and liable to accusation.

If The Sun or Moon is in sextile to one malefic while another malefic makes a handover or reception via square, trine, or opposition., then The native will face disturbances, legal defenses, constraints, imprisonment, or live under suspicion and bad conscience.

If A benefic planet is present with or witnesses a malefic configuration involving the Sun, Moon, Saturn, or Mars., then The native will experience a release from fears and dangers or a change for the better, though they will not remain entirely undisturbed.

If A malefic configuration of the Sun, Moon, Saturn, and Mars exists without the witness of any benefic planets., then The native will be condemned, placed in bonds, or suffer constraint and imprisonment.

If The native has a high social standing or great foundation but possesses a malefic configuration of Sun, Moon, Saturn, and Mars., then The native will suffer anxiety regarding their dignity and life, face accusations or betrayal, and be forced to defend themselves before a king or authority.
If An infant is born with a malefic configuration of the Sun, Moon, Saturn, and Mars., then Fear and danger will pertain to the parents or, if the child is of servile status, to their masters.
If General times and years coincide in the same place, then The cause of constraint or destruction will be complete
If Distribution occurring according to cyclic years, then Produces fears and distress
If A child's nativity has a configuration of constraint or destruction, then Fear regarding the father or the mother, or regarding masters if the nativity is servile
If A benefic planet transits or witnesses the place of a negative configuration, then Release or mitigation of the evil will occur
If A malefic planet transits or witnesses the place of a negative configuration, then The evil is worsened
If Both a benefic and a malefic planet transit or witness the place of a negative configuration, then Both mitigation and worsening of the evil occur
If Malefic planets are in opposition or square to the Sun or the Moon, then Produces fears and constraints
If The nativity is helped by the witnessing of benefics during a period of constraint, then Constraint or accusation arises from military service, debts, or legal obligations rather than imprisonment
If Specific configurations of constraint involving chronic ailments, then Subject to sacred diseases, possessions, sorcery, or fevers

If Malefics (Saturn in Leo, Mars in Capricorn) in sextile to Sun and Moon in Scorpio, with benefics present, then The configuration becomes imaginative and distinguished; the subject may be a soldier in charge of prisoners
If Transmission or reception of malefic planets occurs in a given year, then A climacteric or critical year is identified
If A malefic planet hands over or takes over from the Moon, the Ascendant, or another malefic planet, then A climacteric (critical) year occurs
If The profected year from the Ascendant falls in the sign of a New Moon or Full Moon, or in their squares or oppositions, then The year is climacteric and dangerous
If In a climacteric year, Saturn is found in the four cadent houses of the nativity, then Death, bodily weakness, hemorrhages, dangerous diseases, hidden pains, falls, and sudden dangers
If A climacteric year occurs while benefics testify to the body, then The body is helped, but the crisis affects life affairs and reputation

If Saturn transits the point calculated from Saturn to the lord of the New/Full Moon added to the Ascendant, or its square or opposition, then Death or a dangerous climacteric, either bodily or practical
If The profected year falls in the sign of the North Node, South Node, or their squares, then The year becomes a climacteric year
If The Sun transits the North Node, South Node, or their squares while a malefic aspects the Sun, then If one falls ill, the illness is dangerous and risky
If The Moon transits the same place as the North Node during a period of crisis, then The intensity of the crisis or danger is reached
If A benefic planet is present or testifies during a difficult period, then Protection and mitigation of evil
If A malefic planet conjuncts or testifies to a benefic planet that is providing good, then The malefic acts as a hinderer of the good
If Benefics are present or witnessing a configuration, but a malefic planet is also present or witnessing the same, then The predicted good will be hindered or prevented
If Benefics or malefics act alone without the testimony or presence of other planets, then The resulting effect (good or bad) will be firm and certain
If Planets make a phase or aspect to the Ascending Node or Descending Node, especially if they are retrograde or setting, then They become causes of evils and negative outcomes

If The Moon transits the Ascending Node or its square or opposition, then Actions such as sailing, marriage, business meetings, building, or planting will be unstable, incomplete, harmful, or cause grief
If Benefics are present in the degrees of the Nodes or their squares and oppositions, then They will not produce a full or complete good
If The same chronocrators (time-lords) are found in the same place, then They can provide nothing until they are separated from that place
If A project or matter is initiated when the Moon is with the North Node, then The matter will be undone, cursed, harmful, and unstable; even the presence of benefics will not produce a full good.
If The Moon is moving through the ecliptic places (the Nodes) at the start of an undertaking, then The undertaking will be incomplete, subject to change, and harmful.
If Launching ships, taking military command, or departing for a journey when the Moon is at the Nodes, then The action will be idle, ineffective, and fail to reach completion.

If Establishing temples, religious dedications, or taking oaths when the Moon is at the Nodes, then The gods will not be worshipped effectively, the act will be void, and those swearing oaths will commit perjury.
If Medical treatments are performed when the Moon is at the Nodes, especially if malefics aspect the place, then The treatments are not beneficial, leading to further illness and remaining incurable.
If A year of life falls in the climacteric signs: Aries, Taurus, Cancer, Scorpio, or Aquarius, then The year is dangerous and precarious.
If The Sun transits the climacteric signs (Aries, Taurus, Cancer, Scorpio, or Aquarius) during annual profections, then The specific month will be manifest in its danger or significance.
If The calculation of the antigenesis (solar return/annual profection) is performed, then It confirms the power of predicted outcomes or acts to prevent them.

If The Sun reaches the exact degree and minute it held at the time of birth (Antigenesis/Solar Return), then It confirms or hinders the powers of the natal outcomes for the year, indicating the nature of the annual changes

If A nocturnal birth where the solar return (antigenesis) occurs during the day, then Compare the lords of the day, the lord of the bounds, and the lord of the ascendant against the natal planetary positions to determine the year's quality

If The distance from the transiting Sun to the Moon of the revolution is projected from the Ascendant, then The lord of the resulting sign determines the quality of the 'effective month' (chrematistikos men), especially if it falls in operative signs
If The lord of the monthly sign is aspected by benefics or malefics while in operative signs, then The month's events are judged by comparing the influence of the benefics against the malefics

If The transiting Moon reaches the same phase or aspectual relationship to the Sun as it held at the moment of birth, then The nature of the month will manifest according to the original natal configuration of the Sun and Moon

If The Sun, Mars, Venus, Mercury, or the Moon transit the sign of the annual profection, its square, or its opposition, then These months are highly effective and activate the predicted results or planetary transmissions (paradosis) for that year
If The Sun is in square or opposition to the places of the chronocrators or traditional points, then Foretells the predicted result or outcome indicated in the traditions
If Mars, Venus, Mercury, or the Moon transit or ingress the significant places of the chronocrators, then Indicates the manifestation of the predicted outcome
If Planets make a phase (heliacal appearance) upon entering a sign, then The place becomes more active for the outcome; innovation or activity occurs in the matters
If A planet passes through a sign without forming any aspect, then No change, innovation, or completion of the expected outcome occurs
If The Sun passes through the places of the chronocrators, then The Sun activates and announces the powers of the chronocrators
If The Moon aspects the sign of the pro-neusis (inclination) on a specific day, especially in active (chrematistikos) signs, then The day will be good, distinguished, and beneficial
If The day-sign and the Moon's pro-neusis are found in the same sign, then The day is even better and more powerful
If The Moon or the pro-neusis is averse (no aspect) to the day-sign in non-active signs, then The day will be painful, harmful, or dangerous
If A planet ingresses or aspects the sign where the day falls, then The day becomes significant for good or evil according to the nature of the planet
If A planet makes an ingress (epembasis) or testimony (epimartyresis) on a specific day in a sign, then The day becomes especially good or bad according to the nature of the planets involved
If The day falls on the places of transmissions (paradosis) or receptions (paralepsis), or in square or opposition to them, then The day becomes active and effective for the year's predictions

If The Sun (lord of birth) is opposed to the day, Mars makes an ingress, and the Moon is in Capricorn and waning (apokroustikos), then The action or business is unsettled and trouble or irritation occurs regarding a servant or slave
If The Sun enters a sign, then It predicts the outcome and events of that month
If The first half-month (dichomenia) or full moon occurs, then It looks toward or influences the East (apelioten)
If The second half-month (dichomenia) occurs, then It looks toward or influences the West (Liba)
