If The Moon is in Cancer with the Sun and appears in Leo, then The Moon inclines (proneusei) to Cancer
If The Moon is in Virgo, then The Moon inclines to Gemini
If The Moon is in Libra, then The Moon inclines to Taurus
If The Moon is in Scorpio, then The Moon inclines to Aries
If The Moon is in Sagittarius, then The Moon inclines to Capricorn
If The Moon is in Capricorn and waning, then The Moon inclines to Sagittarius
If The Moon is in Aquarius, then The Moon inclines to Scorpio
If The Moon is in Pisces, then The Moon inclines to Virgo
If The Moon is in Taurus, then The Moon inclines to Leo
If The Moon is in Gemini, then The Moon inclines to Cancer
If The Moon appears in Capricorn at the New Moon, then The Moon inclines to Gemini
If The Moon is in Sagittarius at the New Moon of Capricorn, then The Moon inclines to Pisces
If The Moon is in Capricorn at the New Moon of Capricorn, then The Moon inclines to Aquarius
If The Moon is in Aries at the New Moon of Virgo, then The Moon inclines to Leo
If The Moon is in Libra at the New Moon of Virgo, then The Moon inclines to Cancer
If Profection or inclination from Pisces to Leo, then The predictive influence moves from Pisces to Leo
If Profection or inclination from Aries to Cancer, then The predictive influence moves from Aries to Cancer
If Profection or inclination from Taurus to Gemini, then The predictive influence moves from Taurus to Gemini
If Years occurring in climacteric signs: Aries, Cancer, Libra, Capricorn, Scorpio, or Aquarius, then The years are precarious and dangerous
If Sun transiting through climacteric signs (Aries, Cancer, Libra, Capricorn, Scorpio, or Aquarius), then The month will be manifest and significant in its effects
If Malefic chronocratorship (time-lordship) period, then Condemnation, fear, and critical times occur
If Transition from malefic chronocratorship to benefic chronocratorship, then Restoration of reputation and life, often leading to a greater status than before
If Coincidence of a general decline in the nativity with specific malefic time periods, then Accusations, trials, enmities, and negative changes are prepared
If Benefic time periods or changes in chronocratorship to benefics, then Friendships, recommendations, sympathies, inheritances, and gifts are prepared
If Low-born or weak individuals entering periods defined by the 'bounds of happiness', then They are perceived as wise, unassailable, and successful
If Brave or educated individuals under a malefic initial foundation or time period, then They are condemned to be harsh, cowardly, and inactive, and are oppressed by inferiors
If Fortune (Tyche) raises a person to a high position, then She does so in order to eventually cast them down
If Fortune (Tyche) casts a person down into a lowly or humble state, then She does so in order to eventually raise them up more brightly and gloriously
If A person follows and trusts in Hope (Elpis) and pleasures, then They obtain what they do not expect and fail to achieve what they desire; they remain in unstable fortune and wandering hope

If A person devotes themselves to the foreknowledge of the future and the truth (astrology), then They acquire a free and unenslaved soul, despise Fortune, do not fear death, and remain undisturbed by both good and bad events

If The original casting (katabole) of the birth chart is established by Fate, then It is impossible to overcome the decree through sacrifices or prayers; what is fated will happen without prayer, and what is not fated will not happen even with prayer
If Following the universal chronographies and systematic instructions of the astrological art, then The practitioner will speak everything in the proper order and correctly
If Overlooking specific parts of the chart or failing to synthesize the causes and solutions, then The practitioner will receive a mixture of praise and blame
If Jupiter (Zeus) placing a good mind and wisdom in the breast of an individual, then Many people will benefit from that person's presence and actions
If The fated gifts (ta dedomena) are decreed by the stars, then They will come to pass even if one does not pray for them
If Events are not fated or decreed by the stars, then They will not occur even if one prays for them
If Fate (God) granting the works of war to an individual, then The person will be occupied with military or conflict-related deeds
If Fate (God) granting the lyre, song, or dance to an individual, then The person will possess artistic and musical talents
If Being a 'soldier of Venus' (milites Veneris) and alienated from pleasure or flattery, then The individual becomes a soldier of fate (Heimarmene)
If The individual nature (vessel) is of poor quality when receiving fated influences, then The fated potential is spoiled or turned to a negative state, like wine turning to vinegar

If Children born from the same father and mother but at different moments of the casting (kataboles), then Dissimilar natures and lack of mutual sympathy; divergent fates and characters despite shared parentage
If Birth configuration leading the native orderly and nobly (kosmios kai eugenos), then Glorification of lineage, blessedness, construction of temples, public approval, and posthumous fame
If Birth configuration characterized by a bad disposition or character (kakotropon ethos), then Becoming hateful to parents and kin; discouraging others from procreation
If Native led away by nature and god toward a malefic fate (implied by the context of the katabole), then Enduring just punishment and meeting a shameful or violent end

If A malefic arrangement (kakokosmos) occurs in relation to the places of parents or relatives, then The native becomes an enemy to their parents and kin, and may turn many others away from procreation
If The native is led away from nature and God (astrologically disharmonious), then The native undergoes just punishment and reaches a most shameful or violent end
If The transmission (paradosis) of the 12-year cycle falls into empty places (kenous topous), then Exceptional events occur, or benefics that seem to have control of the time produce evil results
If Mars and the Ascendant are in Virgo and Jupiter is in Libra (2 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 2, 4, 6, 8, 10
If Jupiter is in Libra and the Moon is in Scorpio (2 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 2, 4, 6, 8, 10
If Venus is in Capricorn and the Sun and Mercury are in Aquarius (2 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 2, 4, 6, 8, 10
If Mars and the Ascendant are in Virgo and the Moon is in Scorpio (3 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 3, 6, 9, 12, 15
If Saturn is in Cancer and Mars is in Virgo (3 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 3, 6, 9, 12, 15
If The Moon is in Scorpio and Venus is in Capricorn (3 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 3, 6, 9, 12, 15
If Saturn is in Cancer and Jupiter is in Libra (4 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 4, 8, 12, 16
If Jupiter is in Libra and Venus is in Capricorn (4 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 4, 8, 12, 16
If The Moon is in Scorpio and the Sun and Mercury are in Aquarius (4 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 4, 8, 12, 16
If Mars and the Ascendant are in Virgo and Venus is in Capricorn (5 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 5, 10, 15, 20
If Jupiter is in Libra and the Sun and Mercury are in Aquarius (5 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 5, 10, 15, 20
If Saturn is in Cancer and the Moon is in Scorpio (5 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 5, 10, 15, 20
If Mars and the Ascendant are in Virgo and the Sun and Mercury are in Aquarius (6 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 6, 12, 18, 24, 30
If The Sun and Mercury are in Aquarius and Saturn is in Cancer (6 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 6, 12, 18, 24, 30
If Saturn is in Cancer and Venus is in Capricorn (7 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 7, 14, 21, 28, 35
If Venus is in Capricorn and Saturn is in Cancer (8 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 8, 16, 24, 32, 40
If Saturn is in Cancer and the Sun and Mercury are in Aquarius (8 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 8, 16, 24, 32, 40
If Mercury and the Sun are in Aquarius and Mars and the Ascendant are in Virgo (8 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 8, 16, 24, 32, 40
If The Sun and Mercury are in Aquarius and Jupiter is in Libra (9 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 9, 18, 27, 36, 45
If Venus is in Capricorn and Mars and the Ascendant are in Virgo (9 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 9, 18, 27, 36, 45
If The Moon is in Scorpio and Saturn is in Cancer (9 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 9, 18, 27, 36, 45
If The Sun and Mercury are in Aquarius and the Moon is in Scorpio (10 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 10, 20, 30, 40, 50
If Venus is in Capricorn and Jupiter is in Libra (10 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 10, 20, 30, 40, 50
If Jupiter is in Libra and Saturn is in Cancer (10 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 10, 20, 30, 40, 50
If Venus is in Capricorn and the Moon is in Scorpio (11 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 11, 22, 33, 44, 55
If The Moon is in Scorpio and Mars and the Ascendant are in Virgo (11 signs apart), then The distribution of years or days follows the sequence 11, 22, 33, 44, 55
If In the 4th, 8th, 12th, 16th, and 20th years of life, then The distribution (paradosis) proceeds from Sun and Mercury to Jupiter, from Venus to Mars and the Ascendant, and from Moon to Saturn.
If In the 10th, 20th, 30th, 40th, and 50th years of life, then The distribution proceeds from Sun and Mercury to Moon, from Venus to Jupiter, and from Jupiter to Saturn.
If In the 11th, 22nd, 33rd, 44th, and 55th years of life, then The distribution proceeds from Venus to Moon, from Moon to Mars and the Ascendant, and from the Ascendant and Mars to Saturn.
If In the 12th, 24th, 36th, 48th, and 60th years of life, then The distribution proceeds from Sun and Mercury to Venus, from Moon to Jupiter, and from Jupiter to Mars and the Ascendant.
If The year count is 11 or 19, then This indicates an opposition (diametros) relationship, as 19 minus 12 leaves 7.
If A planet is found positioned in the sign receiving the distribution, then That planet will more effectively act as the giver of the year's results (paradosis).
If No planet is found in the sign of the distribution, but planets are in the following sign, then The planets in the subsequent sign will take over the distribution of the year.
If In the 13th and 25th years of life, then Mars hands over to Jupiter and Jupiter hands over to the Moon.
If The Ascendant, Sun, or Moon reach the rays or degrees of malefic planets (Saturn or Mars) via aphesis (direction), then Causes bad things or the end of life

If Rays of planets fall upon the aphetic degree either natally or by transit (epembasis), then Exceptional and great events occur

If Planets are positioned in angles (kentra), succedent (epanaphorai), or cadent (apoklimata) houses, then The specific house placement determines the strength and manifestation of the predicted results

If Transits (ingresses) occur by conjunction, aspect, or opposition to significant places or the lords of the times, then Contributes significantly to the reversal or success of matters

If The degree of the conjunction (synaphe) and the three degrees on either side are considered, then The timing of the effect will be clearly anticipatory or persistent, similar to the duration of an eclipse
If The planet handing over (paradidous) the time period aspects the planet taking over (paralambanon) in a familiar or useful way, then The predicted result is effective and clearly manifested
If A conjunction's influence remains active, then It persists until another planet intervenes and breaks its power
If The Sun is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 19 months per sign and 19 days per degree
If The Moon is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 25 months per sign and 25 days per degree
If Saturn is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 30 months (2 years and 6 months) per sign and 30 days per degree
If Jupiter is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 12 months (1 year) per sign and 12 days per degree
If Mars is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 15 months per sign and 15 days per degree
If Venus is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 8 months per sign and 8 days per degree
If Mercury is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 20 months per sign and 20 days per degree
If Mars hands over the time period to Jupiter, then The result is better than when Jupiter hands over to Mars
If Malefic planets outnumber benefic planets in the distribution of times, then The predicted outcome is negative
If Benefic planets outnumber malefic planets in the distribution of times, then The predicted outcome is positive
If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) changes, as in the case of twins, then The fate and outcomes are differentiated even if planetary positions are identical
If Malefic planets prevail over benefic planets in the distribution of time periods, then The predicted result is negative and harmful
If Benefic planets prevail over malefic planets in the distribution of time periods, then The predicted result is positive and beneficial

If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) changes, even if planetary degrees remain the same (as in the case of twins), then The centers (angles) are altered, changing the fortune, social standing, and the end of life for the native

If A planet is positioned in a center (angle) relative to another planet, or one is in the Ascendant while the other is in the Midheaven, then The testimony or aspect between the planets becomes more powerful and effective
If A benefic planet rules the time period (chronocratorship) without any malefic intervention, then The native becomes practical, healthy, wealthy, successful, fortunate, bold, and intelligent
If A malefic planet rules the time period (chronocratorship), then The native becomes inactive, sickly, easily overcome, full of opposition, weak, and cowardly
If A planet is a provider (poriastes) and well-aspected (euepibolos) in the native's chart, then The native is fortunate, bold, and intelligent, even if they lack formal education
If A malefic planet (kakopoios) governs the current time period (chronocrator), then The native becomes inactive, sickly, and faces many oppositions and obstacles
If A malefic planet rules the time period and the native is in a state of despair, then The native may be perceived as weak, cowardly, or villainous, and hopes are turned to despair

If Benefic planets (agathopoioi) are poorly placed or afflicted while ruling the time period, then Mixed results occur; benefit is accompanied by harm, and glory is followed by downfall, accusations, or illness
If The hand-over (paradosis) of a time period is to malefic planets, then Expected benefits fail, leading to empty hopes and painful losses
If The hand-over (paradosis) of a time period is to benefic planets, then Success is achieved but only after delay, hardship, and overcoming opposition
If Astrological configurations or distances between planets are far apart, then The predicted results manifest slowly or are delayed
If Astrological configurations or distances between planets are in close proximity, then The predicted results manifest quickly and concisely
If A malefic planet intervenes or takes over a time period from another through opposition, then Downfall occurs due to accusations, envy, and loss of status
If Distant intervals between planets or points, then Slower manifestation of the predicted effects
If Close intervals between planets or points, then Quick or brief manifestation of the predicted effects
If A benefic planet (agathopoios) takes over the time period or transit, then Advancement, faith, benefit, happiness, and good deeds for a short time
If A malefic planet (kakopoios) takes over the time period or transit, then Accusation, envy, downfall, dishonor, misfortune, and sudden danger
If A benefic planet restores its influence after a malefic period, then Restoration of fortune and glory
If Benefic planets are present at the degree of the Ascendant, then Praise, health, pleasant times, and a strong, undisturbed soul
If Malefic planets are present at the degree of the Ascendant, then Critical times (climacterics), illness, and dangerous periods
If The soul or ruling planet is afflicted (kakosis), then Confusion, senselessness, wickedness, mania, and potential separation of the soul from the body
If Harmonious mixing (eukrasia) of planetary natures, then Good temperament, beauty, and success
If Disharmonious or 'blind' mixing of planetary natures, then Unpleasant character, confusion of nature, and lack of clarity in life
If Planets are mixed harmoniously (eukrasia), then The native achieves beauty, success, and a well-ordered life.
If Planets are mixed poorly or in confusion (tholor), then The native experiences blind results, lack of beauty, and confusion in life's affairs.
If Saturn (Cronos) is the significator or prominent, then The native's life is characterized by slowness and things becoming manifest only over long periods of time.
If Jupiter (Zeus) is the significator or prominent, then The native receives the cause of life and good gifts/bodies.
If Mars (Ares) is the significator or prominent, then The native experiences a fiery, sharp, and destructive nature; Mars acts to take away from benefics and life.
If The Sun (Helios) is the significator or prominent, then The native's life is characterized by purity, radiance, and eternal qualities.
If Venus (Aphrodite) is the significator or prominent, then The native is mastered by desires, leading to many diverse outcomes, both good and bad, and governs unions.
If Mercury (Hermes) is the significator or prominent, then The native possesses intelligence, skill in speech, but also bitterness; the native's complexion will be pale or bilious.
If The Moon (Selene) is the significator or prominent, then The native's actions and thoughts are unstable, irregular, and airy in nature.
If Mercury (Hermes) is the ruler of the nativity, then The native will possess intelligence, the power of speech, and a tendency toward bitterness.
If Mercury (Hermes) is the ruler of the nativity, then The native will have a pale complexion similar to the color of bile.
If The Moon (Selene) is the ruler of the nativity, then The native's actions and thoughts will be unstable, irregular, and changeable, mirroring the Moon's course.
If Malefic planets (Saturn, Mars) are active in the chart, then They exert more power and influence than benefic planets, often obscuring or staining the good qualities of the nativity.
If Malefic planets are present in a nativity, even one that appears fortunate, then They act as critics and destroyers of possessions, bringing accusations, pains, and physical or mental sufferings.
If The native is under the influence of benefic planets (Jupiter, Venus), then The native will be simple-minded and trusting, often leading them to be easily deceived or caught by others.

If The native is under the influence of malefic planets (Saturn, Mars), then The native will be suspicious, greedy, and prone to taking advantage of others, finding pleasure in the deprivation of others.
If Malefic planets dominate the nativity's end of life, then The native may face a violent end or be driven to self-harm due to the weight of their misfortunes.
If The lords of the times (chronocrators) transit their own natal places or are in square or opposition to those places, then The ingresses and transits are judged to be vigorous and highly effective
If A planet that has been allotted the hour or authority makes an ingress, then It acts to either preserve or destroy according to its inherent nature and the current time-lordship

If A planet is the active lord of the time (chronocrator) and issues a threat or benefit, then No other factor can prevent its effect; it yields only to the laws of the specific time period until its term is completed
If A planet completes its allotted time period and hands over leadership (paradosis) to another planet, then The planet becomes ineffective and weak in producing either good or evil results
If The exact degree (moira) of a planet or point is accurately determined according to its natural activity, then It becomes possible to make firm and certain predictions about future events
If Diurnal birth with the Sun well-placed, then The Sun is taken as the releasor (aphetis) of the times
If Nocturnal birth with the Moon well-placed, then The Moon is taken as the releasor (aphetis) of the times
If Both luminaries (Sun and Moon) are poorly placed, then The first planet found following the Ascendant (Horoskopos) in zodiacal order takes the first period of time
If Sun is the releasor in the dekaeteris (ten-year period) system, then The Sun rules for a period of 10 years and 9 months
If A planet follows the initial releasor in the zodiacal order during the dekaeteris system, then The subsequent planet rules for a period of 10 years and 9 months
If The planet handing over a time period and the planet receiving it have a friendly or familiar disposition, then The period results in good (agathon) effects
If The planet handing over a time period and the planet receiving it have a hostile or contrary disposition, then The period results in bad (phaulon) effects

If The time-lordship passes from a benefic planet (agathopoios) to a malefic planet (kakopoios), then The malefic power is mitigated or prepared by the preceding benefic, leading to various resources, friendships, sympathies, prosperity, glory, and utility.

If The time-lordship passes from a benefic planet to a malefic planet specifically regarding secret, risky, or paradoxical actions, then Success is achieved in these actions, but the native later regrets them or feels they were a waste of time.
If The times of benefic planets are handed over to malefic planets, then Enmity, dishonor, treachery, strife, danger, sudden and unexpected accusations, and downfalls occur.
If The Moon is in Pisces in a nocturnal birth, located under the earth in a feminine sign and in its own triplicity, then The Moon becomes the ruler of the universal times (chronocrator).
If Saturn is the Horoskopos (Ascendant) in Sagittarius, then Saturn takes part in the sequence of time-lordship following Jupiter.
If The time-lordship passes into the hands of benefic planets, then One should predict good things (agathon).

If Saturn acts as the chronocrator contrary to the sect, positioned in the Ascendant (Horoskopos) and overcoming the Moon (the aphesis)., then Death of a wife, dangerous diseases, financial losses, and legal judgments regarding women or the deceased.
If Saturn overcomes Mercury during its period as chronocrator., then Occurrence of many forgeries and false accusations.

If Saturn rules the time and is involved with matters of the dead or ancient things., then Entanglement in dangerous and harmful business, leading to despair and damage to personal or external affairs.

If Mars takes over the general chronocratorship from the Moon, while Saturn takes over the monthly rule from Mars, and Venus takes the daily rule from Saturn., then Death of a wife, dangerous diseases, and financial losses.

If A legal judgment is rendered concerning a woman, matters of the dead, or ancient affairs under the influence of Saturn., then The native is condemned or suffers distress and danger, potentially leading to the ruin of their own or others' property.

If Saturn is the time-lord contrary to the sect, positioned at the Ascendant, then The native is involved with women regarding funeral or ancient matters, is hard-pressed by creditors, and is nearly in danger.

If Saturn is the time-lord contrary to the sect, positioned at the Ascendant and overcoming the Moon (the releaser), then The native sustains personal or external ruin/loss, falls into despair, and becomes entangled in dangerous and harmful matters.
If Saturn is the time-lord contrary to the sect, positioned at the Ascendant and overcoming Mercury, then Many forgeries, lies, errors, and accusations follow, along with dangerous diseases.

If Saturn acts as the primary lord of a period of 12 years and 9 months, then The time is sub-divided among the planets, with Saturn taking the first 1 year, 7 months, 7 days, and 20 hours for itself.
If Jupiter acts as the primary lord of a period, then Jupiter distributes 1 year, 3 days, and 11 hours to itself as the first sub-period.
If Mars acts as the primary lord of a period of 1 year and 3 months, then Mars distributes 1 month, 22 days, and 6 hours to itself as the first sub-period.
If The Sun acts as the primary lord of a period of 1 year and 6 months, then The Sun distributes 2 months, 23 days, and 22 hours to itself as the first sub-period.
If Venus acts as the primary lord of a period of 8 months, then Venus distributes 14 days to itself as the first sub-period.
If Mercury acts as the primary lord of a period of 1 year and 8 months, then Mercury distributes 3 months, 3 days, and 12 hours to itself as the first sub-period.
If The Moon acts as the primary lord of a period of 2 years and 1 month, then The Moon distributes 4 months, 24 days, and 10 hours to itself as the first sub-period.

If The Sun (Helios) acts as the primary chronocrator in the distribution of time periods, then The Sun distributes sub-periods to the planets: to itself (1 month, 18 days), to the Moon (1 month, 18 days), to Saturn (4 months, 19 days, 12 hours), to Jupiter (1 month, 25 days, 18 hours), to Mars (2 months, 19 days, 13.5 hours), to Mercury (2 months, 27 days, 19.25 hours), and to Venus (1 month, 20 days)

If The Moon (Selene) rules the second month in the sequence of time-lord distributions, then The Moon distributes sub-periods: to itself (4 months, 24 days, 10 hours), to Saturn (5 months, 14 days, 10 hours), to Jupiter (1 month, 9 days, 18 hours), to Mars (2 months, 22 days, 2 hours), to Mercury (3 months, 20 days, 11 hours), to the Sun (3 months, 26 days, 3.5 hours), and to Venus (1 month, 17 days, 3.5 hours)

If Calculating the planetary ruler of a specific day using the 129-day cycle (quaternary system), then Multiply the total years by 365.25, add the days elapsed since the birth, and divide the sum by 129; the remainder identifies the current planetary cycle and its ruler
If The calculation of the 129-day cycle remainder falls within the days allocated to Saturn, then The native faces a period of condemnation, judgment, or restriction (κατεδικάσθη)
If In the sequence of seven-fold (hebdomadic) cycles within the 129-day system, Saturn completes its allotted period, then The planet Mars (Ares) takes over the next period of days in the sequence

If In any birth (geniture), the distribution of times (chronocrators) is initiated according to the seven-zoned order starting from Saturn., then The sequence of time-lords follows the order: Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, Sun, Venus, Mercury, and finally the Moon.

If The release (aphesis) of times is determined by the Sun, the Moon, and the star found immediately following the Ascendant (Horoskopos)., then The star following the Ascendant and the subsequent stars, according to their zodiacal and degree positions, become the rulers of the times.

If The Moon and the Ascendant are blended (mixed) according to their hourly motions and their relationship to critical stations., then They determine the specific quality and timing of life events through their combined influence.
If Calculating the ruler of the week and the days within a specific time-period (aphesis)., then The planet governing the week and the specific days acts as the active time-lord for that duration.
If The Moon is found to be the releaser (apheta) of the chart, then Saturn and Mars act as destroyers (anairetai) and the benefics act as helpers for the length of life
If The Moon forms a conjunction, sextile, square, or opposition to the Ascendant, then These points indicate the beginning, the physical formation, and the end of life
If The Moon and Ascendant are in signs of equal ascension, equal power, or in antiscia, then The relationship between these points determines the vital sector and the length of life
If The Ascendant and the Moon are in square or opposition to each other, then These are judged as deadly (anairetic) degrees and powerful testimonies for the end of life
If A large distance exists between the aphetic points of the Moon and the Ascendant, then The lifespan is calculated by taking half of the sum of the ascensional times of the intervening space
If The Moon's specific degrees in each sign are calculated in relation to the aphetic release and the chronocratorship, then The timing of the destruction (anairetic point) of the life is revealed
If Taking half of the planetary periods (vital time), then Determines the length of life or vital time
If The degree-based phases of the Moon are coordinated with the time-distribution (aphesis), then Indicates the time of destruction or death (anairetes)
If The Moon acts as the releaser (aphesis), then The life is destroyed by the Moon's own phases

If The New Moon (synodos), Full Moon (panselenos), or Quarter Moons (dichotomos) move toward the setting point (descendant), then They become active and effective in determining the time of destruction
If The releasing (aphetic) and destructive (anairetic) places fall within the signs or bounds (terms) of specific stars, then Determines the specific causes and nature of death
If A planet is afflicted (kakoutai) by another star, then The influence of that planet becomes harmful or indicates misfortune
If A planet is assisted (boetheitai) by another star, then The influence of that planet is strengthened or provides protection
If Planets are in configuration (schematographia) with one another by birth, transit, or time-distribution, then Determines the manifestation of events and the quality of the time period
If The Moon's position in longitude and latitude is calculated at the time of birth, then The exact degree of the Moon at the time of conception (aporphime) is revealed
If The Moon reaches the specific degree and latitude it held at the moment of conception, then The gestation period is fulfilled and birth must occur; the Moon cannot exceed this target degree

If The Sun at conception is in Aries and the Moon travels 180 degrees from the preceding syzygy, then The birth occurs in the tenth month, as the 180 degrees of the Moon complete the cycle of the Ascendant
If The Moon's travel exceeds 180 degrees from the point of conception, then Add nine to the count of days to determine the specific day and hour of birth
If The Moon returns to the same degree of latitude (the same point in its cycle), then The cycle completes and returns to its original state, like a rolling wheel
If A native is naturally envious, contentious, and hostile, then They are easily caught and punished; they become more daring and aggressive when provoked

If A native (especially young) attempts to override fate or ignore the distinction of good and evil to pursue personal desires, then They become alienated from friends and kin, rejoice in the misfortunes of others, and face danger due to the malice of enemies
If A native does not honor the gods and does not fear death, then They are led by a daemon toward a sudden and precarious end; their life is sickly or half-dead
If A native accepts and follows the path of Fate (Heimarmene), then They live an unperturbed and painless life, conducting themselves with a brave soul
If A native claims authority over future events or resists the decree of Fate, then They are exposed as powerless, become a laughingstock, and suffer the predestined outcome regardless
If The wheel (trochos) of Nemesis returning to itself in its cyclical motion, then Human affairs and future events are rendered unstable, uncertain, and subject to sudden reversal
If Combining universal (katholikon) and particular (merikon) comparisons in the division of time, then The astrological judgment and division of periods becomes unerring and venerable

If Adhering to the instructions regarding the Sun's sacred circle, the Moon's irregular courses, and the powers of the stars within the twelve signs, then The practitioner attains the ability to converse with the celestial gods and achieves divine insight into the nature of the soul

If Possessing a boastful disposition or an unrepentant/inconsistent mind (metanoeton logismon), then The individual falls back into the same sufferings and remains unable to escape the cycle of misfortune
If The Lord of the Chart (oikodespotes) is found in an angle (pivot) or a useful house, then The planet becomes the primary ruler of the times (chronoi), followed by the planets succeeding it
If Multiple planets are in the same sign competing for time-lordship, then The planet that is more oriental (earlier in degrees) takes precedence in the distribution of times
If The Lord of the Ascendant is in its own place or appropriately configured in another sign, then It is beneficial for the active periods of life and the activities of the soul

If The Lord of the Ascendant is afflicted by malefics or is inappropriately configured, then The active times are weakened; success is short-lived, and time-periods are reduced from years to months or months to days
If The Lord of the Ascendant is not present in the angle, but another planet is present, then The planet present in the angle takes over the rule of the times
If Multiple planets are present in an angle, then They share in the rule of times, but the more oriental planet or the one more familiar to the sign takes precedence

If No planets are found in the angles but are in succedent houses (approaching the angle), then They rule for a short time or for a duration proportional to the degrees they have traversed in the sign
If Determining the quality of the life and its active periods, then One must examine the Midheaven (mesouranema) and its Lord in the same manner as the Ascendant
If Planets are located on the angles (kentron), specifically the Horoskopos, Midheaven, Descendant, or IC, then They possess the primary power and rule over the first periods of life
If No planets are found on the angles (kentron), then The lordship and dominion pass to the planets located in the succedent houses (epanaphora)
If No planets are found on the angles or in succedent houses, then The planets in cadent houses (apoklima) must be considered for the prediction
If Planets are located in cadent houses (apoklima), then They lack power regarding actions and full time-periods, though they still exert some influence
If The Moon (Selene) makes an application (synaphe) or testimony (epimartyria) to the lord of the lot, then This must be synthesized to determine the general outcome of the nativity
If A planet of the sect (hairesis) is found on an angle, then It rules the first periods of time in the native's life
If Planets are oriental (rising before the Sun), then They are superior and more effective than those that are occidental
If Planets are angular or succedent, then They distribute the full ascensional times of the signs and their own full planetary periods
If Planets are in cadent houses (apoklima), then They distribute only the minimum periods (minor years)
If The periods of the planets exceed the magnitude of the ascension (anaphora), then The planets distribute the periods
If The periods of the planets are less than the magnitude of the ascension (anaphora), then The planets distribute the ascension
If A planet is in its own face (idioprosopon) or other proper place (oikeion), then It distributes the ascension of the sign alone
If Planets are found in cadent houses (apoklimasin), then They do not distribute their full ascensions or their full periods
If Malefics are well-configured by their own nature and position, then They become beneficial and providers of life and glory
If Benefics are poorly configured, then They become providers of danger and harm
If Malefics are found in mediocre or humble nativities, then They are truly harmful, causing successive evils and taking away gains even if they help briefly
If Malefics are found in greater or high-status nativities, then They make the native practical, successful, and acquisitive, though prone to boldness, greed, and violence
If Malefics govern high-status nativities, then The life is not smooth; the native falls into turmoil, plots, wars, and uprisings
If Malefics are configured specifically for disaster, then They cause plagues, famines, crop failures, floods, or earthquakes
If Stars become lords of the times (chronocrators), then They fulfill the specific good or bad promise they held in the natal configuration
If Planets are superior (kathuperterountes) or in opposition, then They are more powerful in their effects
If Planets are in their own or opportune signs, then They are more effective and stable in producing their results
If Planets found in the same configuration as at birth while they are ruling the times, then They fulfill the natal promise, whether good or bad
If Planets overcoming (superior position) or in opposition to others, then They are more powerful in their effects
If Planets located in their own signs or appropriate signs, then They are more effective and stable in their results
If Saturn and Jupiter in opposition, especially when in their own signs, then Practical and beneficial results, unless dissolved by an opposing destructive power
If Jupiter and Mars in configuration while in their own signs, then Good and beneficial results
If Mars in a sign other than its own but having a practical ratio, then Practical and beneficial during its assigned time periods
If A planet completes its own greatest period, then The planet fulfills its specific prediction or signification
If Benefic planets in configuration at birth, then Action and glory will occur, though with some oppositions and expenses
If Malefic planets in configuration at birth, then Inaction, losses, and disturbances follow until a benefic signifies
If Sextile aspects acting alone, then Strenuous but beneficial and helpful results
If Sextile aspects acting alone as significators, then Laborious but beneficial results
If Saturn in Cancer opposed by Mars while the Moon is in sextile to Venus, then A plot or conspiracy involving females
If Saturn in Cancer opposed by Mars, then Exile
If The ascension of Capricorn in the chronocratorship, then Danger
If Mars in opposition to the period of Cancer, then Somatic diseases concerning the sight and the feet
If Saturn in Aries in opposition to the Sun in Libra, then Exile
If Both malefics (Saturn and Mars) surrounding or enclosing Venus, then Death of a wife
If Venus in Scorpio overcome by Saturn, then Danger before a king and exile
If Jupiter in opposition to the Moon, then A more philanthropic or beneficial time-lordship period
If Venus in Leo or Scorpio is overcome by Saturn, then A less philanthropic or less kindly period occurs
If Sun in conjunction with Mars while Saturn is in opposition, then Violent death of the father and injury or blindness to the native's eyes
If Saturn in Gemini completes its 20-year period, then Recovery of sight through medical treatment or ointments
If Planets are in their own sign, exaltation, or triplicity, then They become more powerful in their ability to do good or evil
If Jupiter is in its own sign and in the house of God (9th) or the house of the Moon (3rd), then The planet becomes more active and effective
If The rising time of Taurus (23) combined with the period of Mars (15) reaches 38 years, then The native falls into accusation and loss of reputation
If Saturn and Venus are in a sextile aspect (completing 38 years), then The native suffers from envy, obstacles, and loss of rank
If The Moon (25) and Sagittarius (12) total 37 years while Saturn is in opposition, then The native experiences envy and opposition
If Cancer (25) and Jupiter (12) total 37 years, then The native receives a small amount of help or relief
If The rising time of Gemini (28) and Sagittarius (12) total 40 years under Saturn, then Hostility and betrayal by a woman, legal issues, debt, and grief over servants

If Saturn is active during the rising times of Gemini or Sagittarius, then Enmities and betrayals from a woman, legal or written troubles, debts, grief over slaves (either through alienation or death/loss), and bodily distress.

If Malefic time periods are modified by the appearance or intervention of benefic planets, then There is no complete reduction or loss of reputation; instead, friendships and hopes are sown which provide comfort to the individual.
If Benefic time periods are crushed or interrupted by malefic planets, then Friendships turn into enmities, a gradual reduction of life/vitality occurs, and the destruction of reputation is prepared.

If Stars in trine or sextile to the current period bear witness in the subsequent time period, then The stars will manifest the same power of results in the same matters or the same reputation until another power intervenes.

If Sun, Saturn, Jupiter, and Mercury are in Sagittarius, Moon is in Cancer, and Venus is the Horoskopos (Ascendant) in Libra, then The native is deemed worthy of leadership but becomes fearful and subject to envy; they encounter public turmoil and disturbances, leaving their rule unfinished due to disease and death.
If Malefic planets are found in the rising times (anaphora) of Libra or Cancer, then The native is overtaken by disease and death.
If The emanations (aporrhoiai) of the stars as the cosmos revolves, then Produces births, deaths, inheritances, and the rise or fall of reputation (doxas kathaireseis)
If Every momentary deviation (paragklisin) of the stars, then Innovates many things in life and fulfills the purpose of fate (heimarmene)
If Attempting predictions or actions during malefic times (kakopoiois chronois), then Failure through ignorance or the overlooking of a specific astrological place (topos)

If Precise investigation of the individual's disposition (idion diathesin) and the underlying state of the nativity, then Successful prediction of honors and the correct identification of active times (praktikous chronous) for benefits
If Undertaking actions or expectations during benefic time periods (ἀγαθὴν χρόνοις), then The native obtains benefits or favorable testimony (ὠφελείας ἢ μαρτυρίας)

If Undertaking actions during malefic time periods (κακοποιοῖς χρόνοις), then The native fails due to ignorance or the oversight of a specific place/topic (ἀποτυχὼν δι' ἄγνοιαν ἢ παραλείπων τινὰ τόπον)

If The investigation of time periods in relation to the Lot of Fortune and its Lord (τὸν κλῆρον τῆς τύχης καὶ τὸν τούτου κύριον), then Determines the magnitude of gifts, honors, and the overall status of the birth (δωρεᾶς ἢ καὶ τοσαύτης τιμῆς... κατὰ τὴν τῆς γενέσεως ὑπόστασιν)
planets: Lord of the Lot of Fortune

text: If The arrival of death-dealing climacterics (θανατικοὶ κλιμακτῆρες), then Predicts periods of mortal danger or terminal events
If Fatal climacterics (critical time periods) are reached based on the three boundaries (minimum, mean, and maximum), then The life span or health is seized or reaches a critical turning point
If Calculating life periods from the Lot of Honor and its house-ruler, then Determine the periods of the stars and the ascensions of the signs, progressing from hours to days, then months, then years
If Planets are angular (pivotal) and eastern (oriental) and in their own configurations, then Calculate time using days, then months, then full planetary periods
If The subject is an infant (vηπίων), then The calculation of life span must begin from the minimum planetary periods
If Venus is in Aquarius, Saturn is in Aries, and Mars is in Sagittarius, then The calculation of time follows the chain of rulers: Venus is governed by Saturn, and Saturn is governed by Mars
If Planets (such as Mars or the Sun) are located in the 3rd house/place, then The time calculation is performed in months (e.g., Mars contributing 15 months and Sun 19 months)
If House-rulers or specific places are occupied by malefics, opposed by them, or are contrary to the sect, then The predicted outcome for the life span or the specific house is negatively impacted
If House rulers or specific places are occupied or opposed by malefics, or are contrary to sect, then Negative outcome or crisis for the native
If Mercury is positioned in Aquarius, then The life period is calculated using Mercury's months (76) plus the ascension of Aquarius (23)
If The lord of the Lot of Fortune is positioned upon the Lot itself, then The life period is determined by the sum of the sign's ascension and the planet's own period
If Saturn is in trine to the lord of the Lot of Fortune, then Saturn contributes its own period to the total years of life; death occurs when this sum is completed
If Malefics form a configuration and testimony at a specific time, then Indicates a climacteric or critical year for the native
If Planets transit the Ascendant or its lord by succession or opposition while the Lot of Fortune or House Ruler provides no protection, then Signifies a period of crisis or death
If Time-lords (chronocrators) governing specific periods of time, then They manifest their effects through delayed results or echoes, showing the outcome after a short interval

If Configurations (schematismoi) and testimonies (martyriai) of stars to each other during their active time-lord periods, then They exert power and influence over the predicted results during those specific times
If Configurations or aspects made to the Lot of Fortune or its ruler (oikodespotes), then The entirety of the outcome and the constitution of the matter is observed from these points
If Saturn and the Moon in opposition (diameter) during a period where Mars is also influential, then Danger, fleeing from war, being wounded, and being surrounded by the dead
If Squares and oppositions of malefic planets occurring in a hostile or unfamiliar manner, then Continuous troubles, destruction, and inescapable difficulties
If Breaking down time-lord periods from years into months and days for precision, then The exact timing of the predicted outcome (apotelema) is reached and identified
If Saturn acts as the time-lord or chronocrator, then It distributes a period of 30 months
If Venus acts as the time-lord or chronocrator, then It distributes a period of 8 months
If The Moon acts as the time-lord or chronocrator, then It distributes a period of 25 months
If The Sun (Leo) acts as the time-lord or chronocrator, then It distributes a period of 19 months
If Malefics are in square or opposition to significant points, then They cause falls, continuous troubles, and difficult struggles in life where the native is easily broken
If Malefics aspect without the witness of benefics, then The native leads a life of pressure and pain, potentially facing a violent or necessary death
If A benefic planet witnesses or assists a malefic configuration, then The evil is halved, tempered, and the native receives help or comfort
If A planet (benefic or malefic) acts alone in its influence, then The predicted result (good or bad) is certain, full, and stable
If Malefics are in square or opposition but have benefic witness or are in their own places (dignity) or proper sect, then They do no harm and may even be beneficial or helpful

If The Sun is the chronocrator (time-lord), then The mean period of activity is 69 years and 6 months, calculated as half of the sum of its maximum period (120 years) and its minimum period (19 years).

If The Moon is the chronocrator (time-lord), then The mean period of activity is 66 years and 6 months, calculated as half of the sum of its maximum period (108 years) and its minimum period (25 years).
If Mars is the chronocrator (time-lord), then The mean period of activity is 40 years and 6 months, calculated as half of the sum of its maximum period (66 years) and its minimum period (15 years).
If Venus is the chronocrator (time-lord), then The mean period of activity is 45 years, calculated as half of the sum of its maximum period (82 years) and its minimum period (8 years).
If Mercury is the chronocrator (time-lord), then The mean period of activity is 48 years, calculated as half of the sum of its maximum period (76 years) and its minimum period (20 years).

If Jupiter is the chronocrator (time-lord), then The mean period of activity is 45 years and 6 months, calculated as half of the sum of its maximum period (79 years) and its minimum period (12 years).

If A planet acts as a chronocrator over a specific period, then The planet does not produce a uniform good or bad result for the entire duration; instead, effects vary significantly across years, months, and days.
If Determining active (empraktos) and inactive (apraktos) times, then Calculate the times based on the half, third, and two-thirds of the ascensional times of the signs and the planetary periods.
If Malefic planets (kakopoioi) alone are active or present in the time-lord period, then Unguarded and unavoidable negative events occur
If A malefic planet is active but a benefic planet (agathopoios) intervenes or aspects its power, then The malefic influence is tempered, guarded, or mitigated
If A benefic planet is the lord of the time (chronon despote) and is well-configured in the nativity, then The good results will be full and complete

If Benefic planets are in aspect (chrematizontas) and beholding (epitheorousntas) the Sun, Moon, or Ascendant (Horoskopos), then Prediction of length of life, glory, and the substance/prosperity of life
If Malefic planets are in aspect to the Sun, Moon, or Ascendant (Horoskopos), then The nativity is rejected or indicates poor vitality and misfortune
If Benefic planets prevail in the division of time-lords, then Great and practical achievements and success
If Only malefic chronocrators (time-lords) coincide in their periods, then Dangers, demotions (kathaireseis), and many causes of trouble

If The Moon holds a specific numbered place and another planet is in the succeeding place or in application (synaphe), then The time-lords combine their influences to determine the quality of the period
If The Moon occupies a specific place and Jupiter is found in that same place or applies to it, then Signifies glory or a moderate increase in livelihood and wealth
If A malefic planet witnesses or applies to the place occupied by benefics, then Evil or misfortune occurs even during the time periods assigned to the benefics
If A planet is angular (on a pivot), then The planet gives its full allotment of years or time periods

If The Moon and Saturn are in the same place, and Mars is in the following sign making an application, while Saturn is witnessed by Mars, the Moon, or the Sun, then The native will be born of lowly parents and experience reversals, poverty, and afflictions of the eyes
If The Moon is increasing in light but moving toward a darkening or eclipse without being seen by the luminaries, then Signifies causes or diseases related to the eyes
If Saturn and Mars are configured together or in transit during the same time period, then The native will experience dangers and deaths
If The Moon is increasing in light (waxing) but has not yet reached the full moon, while being afflicted, then Signifies blindness or afflictions and causes related to the eyes
If A conjunction or contact with Mars occurs during a specific time period, then Causes inflammation or burning
If The time periods of planetary testimonies are combined, then The predicted results will be completed at the midpoint, the one-third mark, or the two-thirds mark of the total time

If The Moon makes an application (synaphe) to a planet not in the same sign but in the following sign, then The timing of the event is determined by combining the time periods of both signs or positions

If There is an interweaving of malefic and benefic planets in the configuration or time-lord sequence, then The timing and nature of events are determined by the specific mixture of the malefic and benefic influences
If The interweaving of malefic and benefic planets in time-lord calculations, then The timing of events is determined by the combined periods of these planets
If Moon in trine aspect to Mars, then Signifies events related to inheritance or women, but potentially loss of expectation if malefics dominate
If Jupiter in aspect to Mercury, then Contributes to the determination of specific years for legal or inheritance matters
If Mars in opposition or square to Venus, then Indicates conflict or opposition in legal matters, specifically regarding women or inheritance
If Malefic planets in a position of superiority (overcoming) or opposition, then They possess great power to influence the outcome of the period, often resulting in loss or reversal
If Moon conjunct Jupiter and Saturn, then Prevailing in a matter or legal case during the designated year
If Sun in Cancer during a significant time-lord period (e.g., 25th year), then Indicates a period of significance or prevailing in a matter
If Saturn in opposition to Mercury, then The combined years of the planets (e.g., 30 + 20) or their fractions determine the timing of significant events
If At age 25, the Moon is with Jupiter and Saturn, while the Sun is in Cancer, then The native prevails in their current matter or undertaking
